S.FORM: ko'koeno 'o niala mamameoi cu biebiemi to mocmo citela yoni ci hpʉhpʉngʉ, ko'ko te meelʉ asuhcu cocoya na tehela yoni ci hpʉhpʉngʉ.
S.PHON: koʔkoeno ʔo nisɗs msmsmeoi ʦu ɓieɓiemi to moʦmo ʦiteɗs joni ʦi hpɨhpɨŋɨ, koʔko te meeɗɨ ssuhʦu ʦoʦojs ns teheɗs joni ʦi hpɨhpɨŋɨ.
S.TRANSL: 於是祖先們決定要去尋找其他地方，讓族人們有更大的地方可以生活。

S.FORM: netec'u mongoi 'o nia mamameoi, ne ihecu cohivi to cʉecʉ kua'onga cou ihe na'no ngohia. ko'ko 'o cʉecʉ cou tehe akoeva no faeni to mamameoi to 'omo sopepea ci macucumahe.
S.PHON: neteʦʔu moŋoi ʔo nis msmsmeoi, ne iheʦu ʦohivi to ʦɨeʦɨ kusʔoŋs ʦou ihe nsʔno ŋohis. koʔko ʔo ʦɨeʦɨ ʦou tehe skoevs no fseni to msmsmeoi to ʔomo sopepes ʦi msʦuʦumshe.
S.FORM: netec'u mongoi 'o nia mamameoi, ne ihecu cohivi to cʉecʉ kua'onga cou ihe na'no ngohia. ko'ko 'o cʉecʉ cou tehe akoeva no faeni to mamameoi to 'omo sopepea ci macucumahe.
S.PHON: neteʦʔu moŋoi ʔo nis msmsmeoi, ne iheʦu ʦohivi to ʦɨeʦɨ kusʔoŋs ʦou ihe nsʔno ŋohis. koʔko ʔo ʦɨeʦɨ ʦou tehe skoevs no fseni to msmsmeoi to ʔomo sopepes ʦi msʦuʦumshe.
S.TRANSL: 當祖先們要離開時，矮黑人知道後非常捨不得。矮人族決定將他們最珍貴的寶物，送給我們的祖先。

S.FORM: 'o cʉecʉ cou ihe eʉsvʉta to mamameoito, na eni zou la lepocengi to cʉecʉ cou ci kamisamahe. lepocengi ci kamisama la aʉt'ʉcʉ to ma'o'oahngʉ to, lasi pafi to soanono ho aʉtʉca 'o ma'o'oahngʉto.
S.PHON: ʔo ʦɨeʦɨ ʦou ihe eɨsvɨts to msmsmeoito, ns eni zou ɗs ɗepoʦeŋi to ʦɨeʦɨ ʦou ʦi ksmissmshe. ɗepoʦeŋi ʦi ksmissms ɗs sɨtʔɨʦɨ to msʔoʔoshŋɨ to, ɗssi psfi to sosnono ho sɨtɨʦs ʔo msʔoʔoshŋɨto.
S.FORM: 'o cʉecʉ cou ihe eʉsvʉta to mamameoito, na eni zou la lepocengi to cʉecʉ cou ci kamisamahe. lepocengi ci kamisama la aʉt'ʉcʉ to ma'o'oahngʉ to, lasi pafi to soanono ho aʉtʉca 'o ma'o'oahngʉto.
S.PHON: ʔo ʦɨeʦɨ ʦou ihe eɨsvɨts to msmsmeoito, ns eni zou ɗs ɗepoʦeŋi to ʦɨeʦɨ ʦou ʦi ksmissmshe. ɗepoʦeŋi ʦi ksmissms ɗs sɨtʔɨʦɨ to msʔoʔoshŋɨ to, ɗssi psfi to sosnono ho sɨtɨʦs ʔo msʔoʔoshŋɨto.
S.TRANSL: 矮黑人告訴我們祖先，這是矮黑人的守護神。守護神 會保佑我們的族人，給予族人祝福與守護。

S.FORM: ataveisi 'emo maskʉveiaueso cimo sopepea ci macucuma, atavei maezo to lamia p'ohkui ci kamisama, imia yaeza ta'lʉa na lamia hia yupa nanghia.
S.PHON: stsveisi ʔemo msskɨveisueso ʦimo sopepes ʦi msʦuʦums, stsvei msezo to ɗsmis pʔohkui ʦi ksmissms, imis jsezs tsʔɗɨs ns ɗsmis his jups nsŋhis.
S.FORM: ataveisi 'emo maskʉveiaueso cimo sopepea ci macucuma, atavei maezo to lamia p'ohkui ci kamisama, imia yaeza ta'lʉa na lamia hia yupa nanghia.
S.PHON: stsveisi ʔemo msskɨveisueso ʦimo sopepes ʦi msʦuʦums, stsvei msezo to ɗsmis pʔohkui ʦi ksmissms, imis jsezs tsʔɗɨs ns ɗsmis his jups nsŋhis.
S.TRANSL: 後來這12個寶物，也變成了我們所祭拜的神明，也讓我們記得與矮黑人的友誼。

S.FORM: fa'ei, teko peela fii no osko yainca mo atva'esi ʉmnʉ ci sotva'esi ci macucuma 'o atai, pafi no teta conci soanono."
S.PHON: fsʔei, teko peeɗs fii no osko jsinʦs mo stvsʔesi ɨmnɨ ʦi sotvsʔesi ʦi msʦuʦums ʔo stsi, psfi no tets ʦonʦi sosnono."
S.FORM: fa'ei, teko peela fii no osko yainca mo atva'esi ʉmnʉ ci sotva'esi ci macucuma 'o atai, pafi no teta conci soanono."
S.PHON: fsʔei, teko peeɗs fii no osko jsinʦs mo stvsʔesi ɨmnɨ ʦi sotvsʔesi ʦi msʦuʦums ʔo stsi, psfi no tets ʦonʦi sosnono."
S.TRANSL: pasuya，你也可以送給fa’ei你認為最珍貴的禮物，送給他一份祝福。」

S.FORM: taepʉngi ta'lʉi to fa'ei 'o hia aomotʉ'ʉ to ba'i, tesi akoevano acʉha e'lʉa 'omo sopepea ci macucuma. 'emo maica ci macucuma, c'o acʉhʉ ne mohin'ila yuyuso 'e 'atai uhne fuengu ho e'lʉa ci macuccuma.
S.PHON: tsepɨŋi tsʔɗɨi to fsʔei ʔo his somotɨʔɨ to ɓsʔi, tesi skoevsno sʦɨhs eʔɗɨs ʔomo sopepes ʦi msʦuʦums. ʔemo msiʦs ʦi msʦuʦums, ʦʔo sʦɨhɨ ne mohinʔiɗs jujuso ʔe ʔstsi uhne fueŋu ho eʔɗɨs ʦi msʦuʦʦums.
S.FORM: taepʉngi ta'lʉi to fa'ei 'o hia aomotʉ'ʉ to ba'i, tesi akoevano acʉha e'lʉa 'omo sopepea ci macucuma. 'emo maica ci macucuma, c'o acʉhʉ ne mohin'ila yuyuso 'e 'atai uhne fuengu ho e'lʉa ci macuccuma.
S.PHON: tsepɨŋi tsʔɗɨi to fsʔei ʔo his somotɨʔɨ to ɓsʔi, tesi skoevsno sʦɨhs eʔɗɨs ʔomo sopepes ʦi msʦuʦums. ʔemo msiʦs ʦi msʦuʦums, ʦʔo sʦɨhɨ ne mohinʔiɗs jujuso ʔe ʔstsi uhne fueŋu ho eʔɗɨs ʦi msʦuʦʦums.
S.TRANSL: pasuya聽完奶奶說的話，他將所有寶物全部找出來。那些寶物，都是和fa’ei一起去山裡發現的東西。

S.FORM: 'o ohinila iepoepoha 'e fa'ei ho 'avai ho i'ima ci sopepea ci macucuma, ohin'ila apʉnga teai cimo na'no yunghu fkuu.
S.PHON: ʔo ohiniɗs iepoepohs ʔe fsʔei ho ʔsvsi ho iʔims ʦi sopepes ʦi msʦuʦums, ohinʔiɗs spɨŋs tesi ʦimo nsʔno juŋhu fkuu.
S.FORM: 'o ohinila iepoepoha 'e fa'ei ho 'avai ho i'ima ci sopepea ci macucuma, ohin'ila apʉnga teai cimo na'no yunghu fkuu.
S.PHON: ʔo ohiniɗs iepoepohs ʔe fsʔei ho ʔsvsi ho iʔims ʦi sopepes ʦi msʦuʦums, ohinʔiɗs spɨŋs tesi ʦimo nsʔno juŋhu fkuu.
S.TRANSL: pasuya把跟fa’ei一起蒐集的寶物，做成了非常漂亮的項鍊。

S.FORM: auyusi no tec'u mongoi 'o atai. 'o fa'ei isi eho'a 'o atai poa uhto emoosi ho toehungneni ho yabobonʉ. aepʉngʉ yaabobonʉ, isi yaa ta fa'ei 'o isi teoepʉngi ci skuu ho faeni to atai. avinano eʉsvʉta 'o ehohanva to suezopʉ no cʉecoʉ.
S.PHON: sujusi no teʦʔu moŋoi ʔo stsi. ʔo fsʔei isi ehoʔs ʔo stsi pos uhto emoosi ho toehuŋneni ho jsɓoɓonɨ. sepɨŋɨ jssɓoɓonɨ, isi jss ts fsʔei ʔo isi teoepɨŋi ʦi skuu ho fseni to stsi. svinsno eɨsvɨts ʔo ehohsnvs to suezopɨ no ʦɨeʦoɨ.

S.TRANSL: 即將離開的前一天。pasuya邀請fa’ei到家裡吃飯。吃完飯後，pasuya把他做的祝福項鍊送給fa’ei。並告訴他矮人族的故事。

S.FORM: mi'usnu to fa'ei 'o atai ho yainca, "no ataveisi e'vono 'ana tetola meelʉ aoko noteuyunu yoyaso, at'inghia tata'ia 'emo maica ci sopepea ci macucuma tesila asngʉcva no'upi suu, aʉt'ʉca suu, yaeza tooyokeoi na tekola h'oyunsova, tela soano'sio ho 'aveoveoyʉ."
S.PHON: miʔusnu to fsʔei ʔo stsi ho jsinʦs, "no stsveisi eʔvono ʔsns tetoɗs meeɗɨ soko noteujunu jojsso, stʔiŋhis tstsʔis ʔemo msiʦs ʦi sopepes ʦi msʦuʦums tesiɗs ssŋɨʦvs noʔupi suu, sɨtʔɨʦs suu, jsezs toojokeoi ns tekoɗs hʔojunsovs, teɗs sosnoʔsio ho ʔsveoveojɨ."

S.PHON: miʔusnu to fsʔei ʔo stsi ho jsinʦs, "no stsveisi eʔvono ʔsns tetoɗs meeɗɨ soko noteujunu jojsso, stʔiŋhis tstsʔis ʔemo msiʦs ʦi sopepes ʦi msʦuʦums tesiɗs ssŋɨʦvs noʔupi suu, sɨtʔɨʦs suu, jsezs toojokeoi ns tekoɗs hʔojunsovs, teɗs sosnoʔsio ho ʔsveoveojɨ."
S.TRANSL: pasuya對fa’ei說：「雖然以後我們不能再一起玩耍，但希望這個禮物可以陪伴你、守護你，也祝福你以後的生活，都平安快樂。」

S.FORM: i'mi to 'oyonatmopsʉ 'o 'avai, aiti 'o fu'u to ino homo man'i ci hioa, 'o 'avai e'lʉ tomo mav'ov'o ho namusngau ci 'oanʉ.
S.PHON: iʔmi to ʔojonstmopsɨ ʔo ʔsvsi, siti ʔo fuʔu to ino homo msnʔi ʦi hios, ʔo ʔsvsi eʔɗɨ tomo msvʔovʔo ho nsmusŋsu ʦi ʔosnɨ.

S.TRANSL: ’avai放學回家，看到母親忙碌的背影。’avai聞到各種食物的香味。

S.FORM: "ci na'no man'i 'e macucuma, na'no yupa h'unasi 'o lato anana'va ana, zou cuma na te atv'esi ci hie maitane?
S.PHON: "ʦi nsʔno msnʔi ʔe msʦuʦums, nsʔno jups hʔunssi ʔo ɗsto snsnsʔvs sns, zou ʦums ns te stvʔesi ʦi hie msitsne?
S.FORM: "ci na'no man'i 'e macucuma, na'no yupa h'unasi 'o lato anana'va ana, zou cuma na te atv'esi ci hie maitane?
S.PHON: "ʦi nsʔno msnʔi ʔe msʦuʦums, nsʔno jups hʔunssi ʔo ɗsto snsnsʔvs sns, zou ʦums ns te stvʔesi ʦi hie msitsne?
S.TRANSL: 「好多束西啊，跟我們平常吃的不一樣，今天是什麼特別的日子嗎？」’avai問媽媽。

S.FORM: yainca to ino, "aeno, ho hucma o' ohaeva nosu mamespingi, tesi hafa 'o ahngʉsu ho i'omon'a mihna cono feohʉ ci 'o'oko ho maine'e!"
S.PHON: jsinʦs to ino, "seno, ho huʦms oʔ ohsevs nosu msmespiŋi, tesi hsfs ʔo shŋɨsu ho iʔomonʔs mihns ʦono feohɨ ʦi ʔoʔoko ho msineʔe!"
S.FORM: yainca to ino, "aeno, ho hucma o' ohaeva nosu mamespingi, tesi hafa 'o ahngʉsu ho i'omon'a mihna cono feohʉ ci 'o'oko ho maine'e!"
S.PHON: jsinʦs to ino, "seno, ho huʦms oʔ ohsevs nosu msmespiŋi, tesi hsfs ʔo shŋɨsu ho iʔomonʔs mihns ʦono feohɨ ʦi ʔoʔoko ho msineʔe!"
S.TRANSL: 媽媽說：「是啊，明天妳的姐姐，要帶著姐夫和剛滿月的小寶寶回家了呢！」

S.FORM: 'o 'avai kaebʉho mainca, "aʉnmtʉs'a ʉmnʉ! ohaeva no mamespingi mevcongʉ me'unu ne covhi, atavesi nemosola mevcongʉ miteuhi na mohtala ahtu maine'e, micu noana'o ho 'anamita ahtu maine'e, la'u na'na taecingia!"
S.PHON: ʔo ʔsvsi kseɓɨho msinʦs, "sɨnmtɨsʔs ɨmnɨ! ohsevs no msmespiŋi mevʦoŋɨ meʔunu ne ʦovhi, stsvesi nemosoɗs mevʦoŋɨ miteuhi ns mohtsɗs shtu msineʔe, miʦu nosnsʔo ho ʔsnsmits shtu msineʔe, ɗsʔu nsʔns tseʦiŋis!"
S.FORM: 'o 'avai kaebʉho mainca, "aʉnmtʉs'a ʉmnʉ! ohaeva no mamespingi mevcongʉ me'unu ne covhi, atavesi nemosola mevcongʉ miteuhi na mohtala ahtu maine'e, micu noana'o ho 'anamita ahtu maine'e, la'u na'na taecingia!"
S.PHON: ʔo ʔsvsi kseɓɨho msinʦs, "sɨnmtɨsʔs ɨmnɨ! ohsevs no msmespiŋi mevʦoŋɨ meʔunu ne ʦovhi, stsvesi nemosoɗs mevʦoŋɨ miteuhi ns mohtsɗs shtu msineʔe, miʦu nosnsʔo ho ʔsnsmits shtu msineʔe, ɗsʔu nsʔns tseʦiŋis!"
S.TRANSL: ’avai高興的說：「真是太棒了！姐姐嫁到好遠的地方，除了結婚後的第三天回娘家，她已經好久沒回來了，我很想念她！」

S.FORM: "os'ocu cohivi! ne mohta atavei maine'e'e ohaeva no'u mamespingi, 'a momia no maezo ayocʉ tomo man'i ci 'oanʉ." yainca to 'avai. "'a zoueno, aeno anana'o atva'esi ci hie ta ohaeva, maezo ta mamespingi ta sisiya cono yansoua la i'eoemohʉ yontal meesi" yainca ta ino.
S.PHON: "osʔoʦu ʦohivi! ne mohts stsvei msineʔeʔe ohsevs noʔu msmespiŋi, ʔs momis no msezo sjoʦɨ tomo msnʔi ʦi ʔosnɨ." jsinʦs to ʔsvsi. "ʔs zoueno, seno snsnsʔo stvsʔesi ʦi hie ts ohsevs, msezo ts msmespiŋi ts sisijs ʦono jsnsous ɗs iʔeoemohɨ jontsɗ meesi" jsinʦs ts ino.
S.FORM: "os'ocu cohivi! ne mohta atavei maine'e'e ohaeva no'u mamespingi, 'a momia no maezo ayocʉ tomo man'i ci 'oanʉ." yainca to 'avai. "'a zoueno, aeno anana'o atva'esi ci hie ta ohaeva, maezo ta mamespingi ta sisiya cono yansoua la i'eoemohʉ yontal meesi" yainca ta ino.
S.PHON: "osʔoʦu ʦohivi! ne mohts stsvei msineʔeʔe ohsevs noʔu msmespiŋi, ʔs momis no msezo sjoʦɨ tomo msnʔi ʦi ʔosnɨ." jsinʦs to ʔsvsi. "ʔs zoueno, seno snsnsʔo stvsʔesi ʦi hie ts ohsevs, msezo ts msmespiŋi ts sisijs ʦono jsnsous ɗs iʔeoemohɨ jontsɗ meesi" jsinʦs ts ino.
S.TRANSL: 「我知道了！姐姐上一次回來時，我們也是準備了好多好多的食物。」’avai說。「是啊，這是屬於姐姐的重要日子，也是賽夏族女子一生中五次重要的儀式」媽媽說。

S.FORM: ne" noana'o, o'amocu mosola man'i na kuyai, 'upena honci uhnenu lac'o acʉhʉ smaimcovhi coeconʉ. ieni to cou ne noana'o ho engha, hoci yupabobaito o'ates'a na'no ponpohsu ci a'ausna, hoci mevcong na okono mamespingi ho me'usnu nomo covi, tec'u asuhcu ngoveo hotela yupa'u'uso. ko'ko panto lamza anana'va meesia ta maamespingi." yainca to ino.
S.PHON: ne" nosnsʔo, oʔsmoʦu mosoɗs msnʔi ns kujsi, ʔupens honʦi uhnenu ɗsʦʔo sʦɨhɨ smsimʦovhi ʦoeʦonɨ. ieni to ʦou ne nosnsʔo ho eŋhs, hoʦi jupsɓoɓsito oʔstesʔs nsʔno ponpohsu ʦi sʔsusns, hoʦi mevʦoŋ ns okono msmespiŋi ho meʔusnu nomo ʦovi, teʦʔu ssuhʦu ŋoveo hoteɗs jupsʔuʔuso. koʔko psnto ɗsmzs snsnsʔvs meesis ts mssmespiŋi." jsinʦs to ino.
S.FORM: ne" noana'o, o'amocu mosola man'i na kuyai, 'upena honci uhnenu lac'o acʉhʉ smaimcovhi coeconʉ. ieni to cou ne noana'o ho engha, hoci yupabobaito o'ates'a na'no ponpohsu ci a'ausna, hoci mevcong na okono mamespingi ho me'usnu nomo covi, tec'u asuhcu ngoveo hotela yupa'u'uso. ko'ko panto lamza anana'va meesia ta maamespingi." yainca to ino.
S.PHON: ne" nosnsʔo, oʔsmoʦu mosoɗs msnʔi ns kujsi, ʔupens honʦi uhnenu ɗsʦʔo sʦɨhɨ smsimʦovhi ʦoeʦonɨ. ieni to ʦou ne nosnsʔo ho eŋhs, hoʦi jupsɓoɓsito oʔstesʔs nsʔno ponpohsu ʦi sʔsusns, hoʦi mevʦoŋ ns okono msmespiŋi ho meʔusnu nomo ʦovi, teʦʔu ssuhʦu ŋoveo hoteɗs jupsʔuʔuso. koʔko psnto ɗsmzs snsnsʔvs meesis ts mssmespiŋi." jsinʦs to ino.
S.TRANSL: 「很久以前，交通並不發達，不管去哪裡都要走很久的路。對以前的人來說，見面不是一件容易的事情，如果女兒遠嫁了，就更難和娘家的人聯繫。所以我們有屬於女生的祭儀。」媽媽說。

S.FORM: tuocosi to 'avai 'o ino, "zou anouc'o maamespingi nala titeni ta meesi?" yainca to ino, "'a zou, avinano pela to'usni 'ola yusno emoo ho yupa momofi no 'tohʉngʉ, yupatoto'usnu."
S.PHON: tuoʦosi to ʔsvsi ʔo ino, "zou snouʦʔo mssmespiŋi nsɗs titeni ts meesi?" jsinʦs to ino, "ʔs zou, svinsno peɗs toʔusni ʔoɗs jusno emoo ho jups momofi no ʔtohɨŋɨ, jupstotoʔusnu."
S.FORM: tuocosi to 'avai 'o ino, "zou anouc'o maamespingi nala titeni ta meesi?" yainca to ino, "'a zou, avinano pela to'usni 'ola yusno emoo ho yupa momofi no 'tohʉngʉ, yupatoto'usnu."
S.PHON: tuoʦosi to ʔsvsi ʔo ino, "zou snouʦʔo mssmespiŋi nsɗs titeni ts meesi?" jsinʦs to ino, "ʔs zou, svinsno peɗs toʔusni ʔoɗs jusno emoo ho jups momofi no ʔtohɨŋɨ, jupstotoʔusnu."
S.TRANSL: ’avai問媽媽：「這是只屬於女生的儀式嗎?」媽媽說：「是的，這還可以幫助兩個家族維繫感情，互相幫助。」

S.FORM: "ola hia memesi to maamespingi to saisiya, ho moc'on'a yʉ'nʉskʉ maine'e ho micu cono feohʉ'o o'ko maine'e to emoo, toteni ho tac'u bankake 'o oko, 'o ohaeva no mamespingi la hafa 'omo conoemoo ho maine'e."
S.PHON: "oɗs his memesi to mssmespiŋi to ssisijs, ho moʦʔonʔs jɨʔnɨskɨ msineʔe ho miʦu ʦono feohɨʔo oʔko msineʔe to emoo, toteni ho tsʦʔu ɓsnkske ʔo oko, ʔo ohsevs no msmespiŋi ɗs hsfs ʔomo ʦonoemoo ho msineʔe."
S.FORM: "ola hia memesi to maamespingi to saisiya, ho moc'on'a yʉ'nʉskʉ maine'e ho micu cono feohʉ'o o'ko maine'e to emoo, toteni ho tac'u bankake 'o oko, 'o ohaeva no mamespingi la hafa 'omo conoemoo ho maine'e."
S.PHON: "oɗs his memesi to mssmespiŋi to ssisijs, ho moʦʔonʔs jɨʔnɨskɨ msineʔe ho miʦu ʦono feohɨʔo oʔko msineʔe to emoo, toteni ho tsʦʔu ɓsnkske ʔo oko, ʔo ohsevs no msmespiŋi ɗs hsfs ʔomo ʦonoemoo ho msineʔe."
S.TRANSL: 「屬於賽夏族女子的儀式，除了第一次回娘家和孩子滿月回娘家，等到小孩長大之後，姐姐還要帶著所有家人一起回來。」

S.FORM: "hoci 'o ohaeva no mamespingi hocieno na ahngʉ mo mcoi, na 'o'oko ho ma'o'oahngʉ te acʉhʉ maine'e ho no'upu nomo kuzo."
S.PHON: "hoʦi ʔo ohsevs no msmespiŋi hoʦieno ns shŋɨ mo mʦoi, ns ʔoʔoko ho msʔoʔoshŋɨ te sʦɨhɨ msineʔe ho noʔupu nomo kuzo."
S.FORM: "hoci 'o ohaeva no mamespingi hocieno na ahngʉ mo mcoi, na 'o'oko ho ma'o'oahngʉ te acʉhʉ maine'e ho no'upu nomo kuzo."
S.PHON: "hoʦi ʔo ohsevs no msmespiŋi hoʦieno ns shŋɨ mo mʦoi, ns ʔoʔoko ho msʔoʔoshŋɨ te sʦɨhɨ msineʔe ho noʔupu nomo kuzo."
S.TRANSL: 「如果姐姐或舅子去逝了，子女和其他親人也必須回來除喪。」

S.FORM: "ho isi hafa ta ohaeva no mamespingi 'o 'o'oko ho maine'e, pantola ayoca cimo coni ci macucuma, la yainca kukuzo no piepiya, atuhcu titha ta saisiya cila hia memesi, tooyokeoi 'e mao'o'oko tela yutataso ho ʉmnʉ ci yusasmoyʉskʉ, teton'a evasʉzʉ ho toai!" yainca to ino.
S.PHON: "ho isi hsfs ts ohsevs no msmespiŋi ʔo ʔoʔoko ho msineʔe, psntoɗs sjoʦs ʦimo ʦoni ʦi msʦuʦums, ɗs jsinʦs kukuzo no piepijs, stuhʦu tiths ts ssisijs ʦiɗs his memesi, toojokeoi ʔe msoʔoʔoko teɗs jutstsso ho ɨmnɨ ʦi jusssmojɨskɨ, tetonʔs evssɨzɨ ho tosi!" jsinʦs to ino.
S.FORM: "ho isi hafa ta ohaeva no mamespingi 'o 'o'oko ho maine'e, pantola ayoca cimo coni ci macucuma, la yainca kukuzo no piepiya, atuhcu titha ta saisiya cila hia memesi, tooyokeoi 'e mao'o'oko tela yutataso ho ʉmnʉ ci yusasmoyʉskʉ, teton'a evasʉzʉ ho toai!" yainca to ino.
S.PHON: "ho isi hsfs ts ohsevs no msmespiŋi ʔo ʔoʔoko ho msineʔe, psntoɗs sjoʦs ʦimo ʦoni ʦi msʦuʦums, ɗs jsinʦs kukuzo no piepijs, stuhʦu tiths ts ssisijs ʦiɗs his memesi, toojokeoi ʔe msoʔoʔoko teɗs jutstsso ho ɨmnɨ ʦi jusssmojɨskɨ, tetonʔs evssɨzɨ ho tosi!" jsinʦs to ino.
S.TRANSL: 「這次姐姐帶著小孩回娘家，還要準備一個特別的東西，叫靈魂之草，這是賽夏族貼草儀式，祝福孩子平安健康的成長，我們一起去採吧！」媽媽說。

S.FORM: 'o 'avai kokaekaebʉ ho to'usnu to ino si ho toa voyʉ, akameosa talʉa, ne ayusi osila eʉsvʉta to amoconi, 'ote mevcongʉ uhno cou ci ohaeva no mamespingi 'ana tela aoko meelʉ maine'e ci a'a'ausna, la poa noana'o ma'ti pvongua. 'iamatec'ola meelʉ asngʉcʉ maine'e 'avinano panto lan'a titeni ci meesi!
S.PHON: ʔo ʔsvsi koksekseɓɨ ho toʔusnu to ino si ho tos vojɨ, sksmeoss tsɗɨs, ne sjusi osiɗs eɨsvɨts to smoʦoni, ʔote mevʦoŋɨ uhno ʦou ʦi ohsevs no msmespiŋi ʔsns teɗs soko meeɗɨ msineʔe ʦi sʔsʔsusns, ɗs pos nosnsʔo msʔti pvoŋus. ʔismsteʦʔoɗs meeɗɨ ssŋɨʦɨ msineʔe ʔsvinsno psnto ɗsnʔs titeni ʦi meesi!
S.FORM: 'o 'avai kokaekaebʉ ho to'usnu to ino si ho toa voyʉ, akameosa talʉa, ne ayusi osila eʉsvʉta to amoconi, 'ote mevcongʉ uhno cou ci ohaeva no mamespingi 'ana tela aoko meelʉ maine'e ci a'a'ausna, la poa noana'o ma'ti pvongua. 'iamatec'ola meelʉ asngʉcʉ maine'e 'avinano panto lan'a titeni ci meesi!
S.PHON: ʔo ʔsvsi koksekseɓɨ ho toʔusnu to ino si ho tos vojɨ, sksmeoss tsɗɨs, ne sjusi osiɗs eɨsvɨts to smoʦoni, ʔote mevʦoŋɨ uhno ʦou ʦi ohsevs no msmespiŋi ʔsns teɗs soko meeɗɨ msineʔe ʦi sʔsʔsusns, ɗs pos nosnsʔo msʔti pvoŋus. ʔismsteʦʔoɗs meeɗɨ ssŋɨʦɨ msineʔe ʔsvinsno psnto ɗsnʔs titeni ʦi meesi!
S.TRANSL: ’avai開心的幫忙媽媽採著天胡荽，突然想起，之前叔叔告訴他，出嫁的姐姐再也不會回家的事情，讓他難過好久。原來姐姐不但可以隨時回來，還有屬於她的儀式呢!

S.FORM: maitan'e, petohʉyʉ maine'e 'o ohaeva no mamespingi! isi pahsaha 'omon'a na'no oko! amo ho ino yupa tooyokeo 'o ma'o'oahngʉ, acʉhʉ 'aveoveoyʉ homo ivaho yu'eteeuyunu.
S.PHON: msitsnʔe, petohɨjɨ msineʔe ʔo ohsevs no msmespiŋi! isi pshsshs ʔomonʔs nsʔno oko! smo ho ino jups toojokeo ʔo msʔoʔoshŋɨ, sʦɨhɨ ʔsveoveojɨ homo ivsho juʔeteeujunu.
S.FORM: maitan'e, petohʉyʉ maine'e 'o ohaeva no mamespingi! isi pahsaha 'omon'a na'no oko! amo ho ino yupa tooyokeo 'o ma'o'oahngʉ, acʉhʉ 'aveoveoyʉ homo ivaho yu'eteeuyunu.
S.PHON: msitsnʔe, petohɨjɨ msineʔe ʔo ohsevs no msmespiŋi! isi pshsshs ʔomonʔs nsʔno oko! smo ho ino jups toojokeo ʔo msʔoʔoshŋɨ, sʦɨhɨ ʔsveoveojɨ homo ivsho juʔeteeujunu.
S.TRANSL: 這天，姐姐終於回來了!她的懷裡抱著小嬰兒!爸爸和媽媽相互和親家問好，大家都好高興能再次相聚。

S.FORM: akameosʉ na'na 'aveoveoyʉ 'o emoo, acʉhʉ man'i ci hioa ho hioa 'o meesi.
S.PHON: sksmeosɨ nsʔns ʔsveoveojɨ ʔo emoo, sʦɨhɨ msnʔi ʦi hios ho hios ʔo meesi.
S.FORM: akameosʉ na'na 'aveoveoyʉ 'o emoo, acʉhʉ man'i ci hioa ho hioa 'o meesi.

S.TRANSL: 家裡一下變得非常熱鬧，大家都忙著儀式的舉行。

S.FORM: 'o 'avai, mayo to isi iachia toai ci voyʉ, topceni to sapci to oko, tooyokeoi 'o oko ho poa soanono ho yutataso, maezo taihio to ohaeva no mamespingi hafa 'e tooyokeo ta emoo ho maine'e.
S.PHON: ʔo ʔsvsi, msjo to isi isʦhis tosi ʦi vojɨ, topʦeni to sspʦi to oko, toojokeoi ʔo oko ho pos sosnono ho jutstsso, msezo tsihio to ohsevs no msmespiŋi hsfs ʔe toojokeo ts emoo ho msineʔe.

S.TRANSL: ’avai拿著親手採的靈魂之草，貼在嬰兒的臉上，祝福嬰兒平安長大，也代表著姐姐帶著大家的祝福回去。

S.FORM: 'avai na'no 'aveoveoyʉ tala hia memesi ta huehungu, pela poa maine'e 'o ohae va no mamespingi ho oko acʉhʉ meelʉ maine'e, toehunga tooyokeoi ta ma'o'oahngʉ.
S.PHON: ʔsvsi nsʔno ʔsveoveojɨ tsɗs his memesi ts huehuŋu, peɗs pos msineʔe ʔo ohse vs no msmespiŋi ho oko sʦɨhɨ meeɗɨ msineʔe, toehuŋs toojokeoi ts msʔoʔoshŋɨ.

S.TRANSL: ’avai非常感恩部落的習俗，讓姐姐和寶寶都能回到娘家，受到族人們的祝福。

S.FORM: ne ohen'ala aʉt'ʉca to maaya i'o seifu to maaya ihe ocia yaa 'o ma'maica ta fuengu, uk'a ntʉha emo'usnu ta fuengu. 'enepio ci hosa no taia soku 'o ihe pohcing'ha, ohecula sʉ'nova ta taia zoku ne mio 'o uatang ci toomoku, hafa 'omo cono suezopʉ ho suyuni 'o maaya, mo'so botngonʉ'sio 'o heetai to maaya, ho noemʉhʉ 'o soanʉthʉhe, na'no tumi to mahohosa, o'amo suv'ohʉ.
S.PHON: ne ohenʔsɗs sɨtʔɨʦs to mssjs iʔo seifu to mssjs ihe oʦis jss ʔo msʔmsiʦs ts fueŋu, ukʔs ntɨhs emoʔusnu ts fueŋu. ʔenepio ʦi hoss no tsis soku ʔo ihe pohʦiŋʔhs, oheʦuɗs sɨʔnovs ts tsis zoku ne mio ʔo ustsŋ ʦi toomoku, hsfs ʔomo ʦono suezopɨ ho sujuni ʔo mssjs, moʔso ɓotŋonɨʔsio ʔo heetsi to mssjs, ho noemɨhɨ ʔo sosnɨthɨhe, nsʔno tumi to mshohoss, oʔsmo suvʔohɨ.

S.TRANSL: 在日本統治的時代，日本政府為了取得山上的資源，不斷往山林推進。許多泰雅族的部落被侵犯，讓泰雅族人感到不滿。於是大頭目Watan，帶領族人奮力抵抗日本人，但日軍人數眾多，武器精良，各部落傷亡慘重，抗爭並沒有成功。

S.PHON: jontomo pɨvʔɨ hoss, mo sʦɨhɨ jss ʦoni ʦihe ɨmnɨs ʦi pɨvʔɨ, sʦɨhɨ sɨʔeɨsɨ tomo pɨvʔɨ ʦi jɨsɨ.
S.FORM: yontomo pʉv'ʉ hosa, mo acʉhʉ yaa coni cihe ʉmnʉa ci pʉv'ʉ, acʉhʉ sʉ'eʉsʉ tomo pʉv'ʉ ci yʉsʉ.

S.TRANSL: 在顏色部落裡，每個人都有一個最喜歡的顏色，身上都穿著那個顏色的衣服。

S.FORM: nemoson'a 'o'okosi 'o'o'o'ko, o'amocu ohe cohivi cuma na ihe ʉmnʉa ci pʉv'ʉ, lac'u acʉhʉ sʉ'eʉsʉ tomo fʉecʉ'ia ci yʉsʉ.
S.PHON: nemosonʔs ʔoʔokosi ʔoʔoʔoʔko, oʔsmoʦu ohe ʦohivi ʦums ns ihe ɨmnɨs ʦi pɨvʔɨ, ɗsʦʔu sʦɨhɨ sɨʔeɨsɨ tomo fɨeʦɨʔis ʦi jɨsɨ.

S.PHON: nemosonʔs ʔoʔokosi ʔoʔoʔoʔko, oʔsmoʦu ohe ʦohivi ʦums ns ihe ɨmnɨs ʦi pɨvʔɨ, ɗsʦʔu sʦɨhɨ sɨʔeɨsɨ tomo fɨeʦɨʔis ʦi jɨsɨ.
S.TRANSL: 孩子們還小的時候，還不知道自己喜歡什麼顏色，就會穿著白色的衣服。

S.FORM: fiho to hia yususuhci, tahecu iachia e'lʉa 'o lahe ʉmnʉa ci pʉv'ʉ.
S.PHON: fiho to his jususuhʦi, tsheʦu isʦhis eʔɗɨs ʔo ɗshe ɨmnɨs ʦi pɨvʔɨ.

S.TRANSL: 慢慢長大以後，他們就會找到自己最喜歡的顏色。

S.TRANSL: 有一天，avai看到朋友們都有了自己的顏色，而他身上卻還穿著白色。

S.TRANSL: 2022年，俄國又對烏克蘭發動大規模的軍事侵略，許多人都在戰爭中死去，許多城市都在戰爭中被夷為平地。

S.FORM: 'o soleng ihe suyumi 'one 'ukolang ci hia yu'susuyumo, o'aihes'a anovac'o opcoza 'o yatatiskova, 'avina'no mo boemi nomo kuici a'ausna ho auski, 'imi tamo maica ci hia yu'susuyumo ho asuhcau na'no mikuzkuzo ci a'ausna.
S.PHON: ʔo soɗeŋ ihe sujumi ʔone ʔukoɗsŋ ʦi his juʔsusujumo, oʔsihesʔs snovsʦʔo opʦozs ʔo jststiskovs, ʔsvinsʔno mo ɓoemi nomo kuiʦi sʔsusns ho suski, ʔimi tsmo msiʦs ʦi his juʔsusujumo ho ssuhʦsu nsʔno mikuzkuzo ʦi sʔsusns.

S.TRANSL: 2020年一月，武漢遊客在泰國被診斷患有新冠病毒，成為在中國境外確診的首例病例。

S.PHON: stsvei si miʦu jups popoezuhu tsmo msiʦs ʦi smsmio ʔe zenseksi, ts kskukoʔks mo ssuhʦu spuhŋu ɓotŋonɨ ʔomo msiʦs ʦi smsmio, ts ɗekisi ts jststiskovs eni nsmo stvsʔesi mioino msteoŋsɓo ʦi smsmio.

S.TRANSL: 之後全球爆發了新冠病毒傳染，各國的新增病例數不斷升高，成為人類歷史上大規模流行病之一。

S.FORM: ne mohcu aemo'ʉ emo maica ci amamio. feohʉ no 'eosa 'o tmuoteuyuna no 'eisei ta sekai ihecu aʉla tos'ongki 'emo maica ci amamio "2019mi'ausna no ungo ci amamio". ta taiwan isi yainca "faeva mi'ausna no ungo ci amamio no thuhu", lacuc'o yaimnca "faeva mi'ausna ungo ci amamio no thuhu."
S.PHON: ne mohʦu semoʔɨ emo msiʦs ʦi smsmio. feohɨ no ʔeoss ʔo tmuoteujuns no ʔeisei ts seksi iheʦu sɨɗs tosʔoŋki ʔemo msiʦs ʦi smsmio "****miʔsusns no uŋo ʦi smsmio". ts tsi*sn isi jsinʦs "fsevs miʔsusns no uŋo ʦi smsmio no thuhu", ɗsʦuʦʔo jsimnʦs "fsevs miʔsusns uŋo ʦi smsmio no thuhu."

S.TRANSL: 病毒擴散，重創各國的醫療系統。2月世界衛生組織正式將此疾病命名為「2019冠狀病毒病」。在台灣則稱它為「新型冠狀病毒肺炎」，簡稱「新冠肺炎」。

S.FORM: 'emo maica ci faeva ungo ci amamio mo mainenu na hia yuyafo? mo'so maica 'o feango to kupica mo yaa mahi'o no amamio, pantola bonʉ to kupica ho poa pozuhua. pantola mainca, emo maica ci amamio la titha yu'susuyumo ci soanothʉ.
S.PHON: ʔemo msiʦs ʦi fsevs uŋo ʦi smsmio mo msinenu ns his jujsfo? moʔso msiʦs ʔo fesŋo to kupiʦs mo jss mshiʔo no smsmio, psntoɗs ɓonɨ to kupiʦs ho pos pozuhus. psntoɗs msinʦs, emo msiʦs ʦi smsmio ɗs tiths juʔsusujumo ʦi sosnothɨ.

S.TRANSL: 新冠病毒到底是怎麼出現的呢?有人說，因為蝙蝠身上帶有病毒，人吃了蝙蝠而被感染。也有人說，病毒是化學武器。

S.FORM: at'inghe 'emo macaci pat'a'ausna o'amocu isi asnasnana, ac'ʉhʉ maitan'e o'amocu ito cohivi 'emo maica ci amamio mo mainenu na hia cmʉfeʉa.
S.PHON: stʔiŋhe ʔemo msʦsʦi pstʔsʔsusns oʔsmoʦu isi ssnssnsns, sʦʔɨhɨ msitsnʔe oʔsmoʦu ito ʦohivi ʔemo msiʦs ʦi smsmio mo msinenu ns his ʦmɨfeɨs.

S.TRANSL: 但這些說法都沒有被證實，我們依然不知道這個病毒是如何產生。

S.FORM: moc'o pio no hie micu nongabo 'emo maica ci amamio, mav'ov'o no hpʉhpʉngʉ 'e isi asnsana ti'eopi ta amamio micu asa'o no posimaskʉ, 'omo mcoi maezo asngʉcʉ apuhngu, 'o o'amocu isi tiv'ov'oha teai ci micu mcoi at'ingha poe'oha po'usna to vioing.
S.PHON: moʦʔo pio no hie miʦu noŋsɓo ʔemo msiʦs ʦi smsmio, msvʔovʔo no hpɨhpɨŋɨ ʔe isi ssnssns tiʔeopi ts smsmio miʦu sssʔo no posimsskɨ, ʔomo mʦoi msezo ssŋɨʦɨ spuhŋu, ʔo oʔsmoʦu isi tivʔovʔohs tesi ʦi miʦu mʦoi stʔiŋhs poeʔohs poʔusns to vioiŋ.

S.TRANSL: 疫情在短時間內擴大，各國確診人數突破百萬，死亡人數也不斷增加，來不及處理的屍體被堆放在醫院。

S.FORM: kaku'ko'ka ahoza pomʉti 'o hpʉhpʉngʉhe, 'ote poa yʉmeʉmʉ 'o cou to macmo ci hpʉhpʉngʉ. 'o 'a'ausna no covnʉ ho 'ola hia yupa mhimhino ci a'a'ausna acʉha poa kuzoa. o'ala smeecʉ'ho moyafo momcovhi 'o cou, 'ola tasmi to yupasʉ ta kaku'ko'ka acʉha poa kuzoa, 'okeizai ta zensekai acʉha poa aun'on'oia.
S.PHON: kskuʔkoʔks shozs pomɨti ʔo hpɨhpɨŋɨhe, ʔote pos jɨmeɨmɨ ʔo ʦou to msʦmo ʦi hpɨhpɨŋɨ. ʔo ʔsʔsusns no ʦovnɨ ho ʔoɗs his jups mhimhino ʦi sʔsʔsusns sʦɨhs pos kuzos. oʔsɗs smeeʦɨʔho mojsfo momʦovhi ʔo ʦou, ʔoɗs tssmi to jupssɨ ts kskuʔkoʔks sʦɨhs pos kuzos, ʔokeizsi ts zenseksi sʦɨhs pos sunʔonʔois.

S.TRANSL: 各個國家開始進行鎖國，限制其他國家的人進入。觀光業、貿易往來都受到限制。國內人民不敢出門，各個產業都受到影響，全球經濟因此受到重創。

S.FORM: 'imi tamo maica ci amamio ho aezuhu 'ola h'oyunsova tamo macicihi. homo emoyafo la acnia tomʉti 'e ngayo, i'ote yoni la acniac'o hʉsvʉta 'ote h'obotngonʉa, la hʉsvʉta na hia cuveua ta macicihi, epsʉpsʉ to 'alukoolu, maica 'ola hia ayoyocʉ.
S.PHON: ʔimi tsmo msiʦs ʦi smsmio ho sezuhu ʔoɗs hʔojunsovs tsmo msʦiʦihi. homo emojsfo ɗs sʦnis tomɨti ʔe ŋsjo, iʔote joni ɗs sʦnisʦʔo hɨsvɨts ʔote hʔoɓotŋonɨs, ɗs hɨsvɨts ns his ʦuveus ts msʦiʦihi, epsɨpsɨ to ʔsɗukooɗu, msiʦs ʔoɗs his sjojoʦɨ.

S.TRANSL: 人民因為疫情的影響改變了生活習慣。出門必須戴著口罩，各場所限制人數、量體溫、噴酒精等防疫措施。

S.FORM: e'ola hia tmopsʉ lacuc'o 'imomcovhi ho mo'ma cohio, lacuc'o poa yooto emoo 'o 'o'oko ho ti'tho to kanpiuto ho aʉsvʉsvʉt'ʉ. 'ola yoonto 'oyona tmopsʉ ci cou lacuc'o yonto emoo ho yahioai, la man'i cila oanlu kaingi, 'ola hia poʉt'ʉcʉ tola mav'ov'o cilan'a mihna yao ci mamaica.
S.PHON: eʔoɗs his tmopsɨ ɗsʦuʦʔo ʔimomʦovhi ho moʔms ʦohio, ɗsʦuʦʔo pos jooto emoo ʔo ʔoʔoko ho tiʔtho to ksnpiuto ho sɨsvɨsvɨtʔɨ. ʔoɗs joonto ʔojons tmopsɨ ʦi ʦou ɗsʦuʦʔo jonto emoo ho jshiosi, ɗs msnʔi ʦiɗs osnɗu ksiŋi, ʔoɗs his poɨtʔɨʦɨ toɗs msvʔovʔo ʦiɗsnʔs mihns jso ʦi msmsiʦs.

S.TRANSL: 上課方式也改成了遠距教學，讓學生在家使用電腦學習。上班族也改成了居家辦公，許多網路會議、遠端操作的新興技術產生。

S.FORM: 'e oanlu micu na'no koa tinpongpohsu ci la titha ci macucuma. la hʉsvʉta na tela peihcʉ'hi tamo macicihi. poa kakutia na tela hia huhucmasi moyafo, poa man'i na tela hia noteuyuneni 'e cono emoo.
S.PHON: ʔe osnɗu miʦu nsʔno kos tinpoŋpohsu ʦi ɗs tiths ʦi msʦuʦums. ɗs hɨsvɨts ns teɗs peihʦɨʔhi tsmo msʦiʦihi. pos kskutis ns teɗs his huhuʦmssi mojsfo, pos msnʔi ns teɗs his noteujuneni ʔe ʦono emoo.

S.TRANSL: 網路變成了便利的工具，考驗著人們自律。少去通勤時間的干擾，多出的時間可以和家人共處。

S.FORM: tov'oha nemo 2021, 'e macicihi cu ahoi poa ciusa to s'os'o mateongabo, 'o h'obotongonʉa to is ti'eopi ho mcoi isicu husansana ho mici asuhcu kakutia.

S.TRANSL: 2022年，各國鬆綁政策，各類群聚活動也開始舉辦。

S.TRANSL: 雖然因疫情失去了很多，不論是各產業或是身邊的人。但也因此，人類不斷地進步。直至今日雖然無法消滅新冠病毒，但是我們找到了與病毒共存的辦法。

S.FORM: cu ae'aepʉngʉ, yainca to lama'cohio, "hucma, butatalʉa hafa na iachi 'i'ihosa, avinano mahafo no osko ʉmnʉa ci bʉvnʉ."

S.FORM: to h'oceona ta cou, na yupa einu na atv'a'esi meoino a'a'ausna ta cou. ne noana'o uk'a mocu ci ohola tposi ci tposʉ, 'o niala mamameopto o'a mocu mosola titposʉ ho yu'tasvʉtʉ note hioa, mosoc'on'ala boemi to ngyo ho yu'tasvʉ'tʉ note hihioa, tac'u ianan'ova fihi 'e isi yu'tasvʉta ci hioa, o'ala yupa nia meknuyu.
S.PHON: to hʔoʦeons ts ʦou, ns jups einu ns stvʔsʔesi meoino sʔsʔsusns ts ʦou. ne nosnsʔo ukʔs moʦu ʦi ohoɗs tposi ʦi tposɨ, ʔo nisɗs msmsmeopto oʔs moʦu mosoɗs titposɨ ho juʔtssvɨtɨ note hios, mosoʦʔonʔsɗs ɓoemi to ŋjo ho juʔtssvɨʔtɨ note hihios, tsʦʔu isnsnʔovs fihi ʔe isi juʔtssvɨts ʦi hios, oʔsɗs jups nis meknuju.
S.FORM: to h'oceona ta cou, na yupa einu na atv'a'esi meoino a'a'ausna ta cou. ne noana'o uk'a mocu ci ohola tposi ci tposʉ, 'o niala mamameopto o'a mocu mosola titposʉ ho yu'tasvʉtʉ note hioa, mosoc'on'ala boemi to ngyo ho yu'tasvʉ'tʉ note hihioa, tac'u ianan'ova fihi 'e isi yu'tasvʉta ci hioa, o'ala yupa nia meknuyu.
S.PHON: to hʔoʦeons ts ʦou, ns jups einu ns stvʔsʔesi meoino sʔsʔsusns ts ʦou. ne nosnsʔo ukʔs moʦu ʦi ohoɗs tposi ʦi tposɨ, ʔo nisɗs msmsmeopto oʔs moʦu mosoɗs titposɨ ho juʔtssvɨtɨ note hios, mosoʦʔonʔsɗs ɓoemi to ŋjo ho juʔtssvɨʔtɨ note hihios, tsʦʔu isnsnʔovs fihi ʔe isi juʔtssvɨts ʦi hios, oʔsɗs jups nis meknuju.
S.TRANSL: 在原住民的傳統裡，誠信是非常重要的事情。古時沒有文字，我們的祖先不用書面契約，藉著口頭的約定和簡單的儀式，雙方就會遵守，不會互相欺騙。

S.FORM: 'e a'a'ausna ta hpʉhpʉngʉ maitan'e micu na'na asuhcu aemo'ʉ, botngonʉ ci cou la meknuyu to macmo ci cou, cu maezo pebobotngonʉ 'ola peknui ci cou. 'avinano 'ola momeknuyu ci cou la m'eaco tote ohteuyuni ci kongsʉ, tacu noteuyunu ho ma'to'tohʉngʉ to te titha meknu no mocmo ci a'a'ausna.
S.PHON: ʔe sʔsʔsusns ts hpɨhpɨŋɨ msitsnʔe miʦu nsʔns ssuhʦu semoʔɨ, ɓotŋonɨ ʦi ʦou ɗs meknuju to msʦmo ʦi ʦou, ʦu msezo peɓoɓotŋonɨ ʔoɗs peknui ʦi ʦou. ʔsvinsno ʔoɗs momeknuju ʦi ʦou ɗs mʔesʦo tote ohteujuni ʦi koŋsɨ, tsʦu noteujunu ho msʔtoʔtohɨŋɨ to te tiths meknu no moʦmo ʦi sʔsʔsusns.
S.FORM: 'e a'a'ausna ta hpʉhpʉngʉ maitan'e micu na'na asuhcu aemo'ʉ, botngonʉ ci cou la meknuyu to macmo ci cou, cu maezo pebobotngonʉ 'ola peknui ci cou. 'avinano 'ola momeknuyu ci cou la m'eaco tote ohteuyuni ci kongsʉ, tacu noteuyunu ho ma'to'tohʉngʉ to te titha meknu no mocmo ci a'a'ausna.
S.PHON: ʔe sʔsʔsusns ts hpɨhpɨŋɨ msitsnʔe miʦu nsʔns ssuhʦu semoʔɨ, ɓotŋonɨ ʦi ʦou ɗs meknuju to msʦmo ʦi ʦou, ʦu msezo peɓoɓotŋonɨ ʔoɗs peknui ʦi ʦou. ʔsvinsno ʔoɗs momeknuju ʦi ʦou ɗs mʔesʦo tote ohteujuni ʦi koŋsɨ, tsʦu noteujunu ho msʔtoʔtohɨŋɨ to te tiths meknu no moʦmo ʦi sʔsʔsusns.
S.TRANSL: 現代的社會變得愈來愈複雜了，很多人會欺騙別人，也有愈來愈多的人被騙。騙人的人甚至都可以組成公司，專門思考有哪些騙人的方法。

S.FORM: ta mihnan'a, mo botngonʉ ci cou ta taivang ihe pknui ho poa uhne ciengpucai ho yahioa, 'enepio ci haahocngʉ ihe pa'hismosmoi ho poa phienineni 'o macucuma to feangohe, mazo pio ci maamespingi yaeza pa'hismosmoi ho psu'usneni 'to noasisi. ihe yaineno ci ac'o pela peknui?
S.PHON: ts mihnsnʔs, mo ɓotŋonɨ ʦi ʦou ts tsivsŋ ihe pknui ho pos uhne ʦieŋpuʦsi ho jshios, ʔenepio ʦi hsshoʦŋɨ ihe psʔhismosmoi ho pos phienineni ʔo msʦuʦums to fesŋohe, mszo pio ʦi mssmespiŋi jsezs psʔhismosmoi ho psuʔusneni ʔto nossisi. ihe jsineno ʦi sʦʔo peɗs peknui?
S.FORM: ta mihnan'a, mo botngonʉ ci cou ta taivang ihe pknui ho poa uhne ciengpucai ho yahioa, 'enepio ci haahocngʉ ihe pa'hismosmoi ho poa phienineni 'o macucuma to feangohe, mazo pio ci maamespingi yaeza pa'hismosmoi ho psu'usneni 'to noasisi. ihe yaineno ci ac'o pela peknui?
S.PHON: ts mihnsnʔs, mo ɓotŋonɨ ʦi ʦou ts tsivsŋ ihe pknui ho pos uhne ʦieŋpuʦsi ho jshios, ʔenepio ʦi hsshoʦŋɨ ihe psʔhismosmoi ho pos phienineni ʔo msʦuʦums to fesŋohe, mszo pio ʦi mssmespiŋi jsezs psʔhismosmoi ho psuʔusneni ʔto nossisi. ihe jsineno ʦi sʦʔo peɗs peknui?
S.TRANSL: 近年來，臺灣有許多人到柬埔寨打工被騙，有些男生被迫販賣自己的器官，有些女生被迫賣淫。他們是怎麼被騙的呢？

S.FORM: 'e hpʉhpʉngʉ to ciengpucai, mo no'usnu ta tongnanya, ne no'anao mosola athcu yaezoi ci hpʉhpʉngʉ. ta mihnan'a, mo na'na mayahe 'o hia ohsusuhcu ta ciengpucai, 'ola hia mouyoyai tola mav'ov'o ci macucuma maezo na'na mayahe. mo maezo man'i ci kongsʉ ta taivang la uhne ceingpucai ho m'eac'o to koozo, 'emo maica ci koozo na'no sino yata taivang 'ol axtxcx.
S.PHON: ʔe hpɨhpɨŋɨ to ʦieŋpuʦsi, mo noʔusnu ts toŋnsnjs, ne noʔsnso mosoɗs sthʦu jsezoi ʦi hpɨhpɨŋɨ. ts mihnsnʔs, mo nsʔns msjshe ʔo his ohsusuhʦu ts ʦieŋpuʦsi, ʔoɗs his moujojsi toɗs msvʔovʔo ʦi msʦuʦums msezo nsʔns msjshe. mo msezo msnʔi ʦi koŋsɨ ts tsivsŋ ɗs uhne ʦeiŋpuʦsi ho mʔesʦʔo to koozo, ʔemo msiʦs ʦi koozo nsʔno sino jsts tsivsŋ ʔoɗ s*t*ʦ*.
S.FORM: 'e hpʉhpʉngʉ to ciengpucai, mo no'usnu ta tongnanya, ne no'anao mosola athcu yaezoi ci hpʉhpʉngʉ. ta mihnan'a, mo na'na mayahe 'o hia ohsusuhcu ta ciengpucai, 'ola hia mouyoyai tola mav'ov'o ci macucuma maezo na'na mayahe. mo maezo man'i ci kongsʉ ta taivang la uhne ceingpucai ho m'eac'o to koozo, 'emo maica ci koozo na'no sino yata taivang 'ol axtxcx.
S.PHON: ʔe hpɨhpɨŋɨ to ʦieŋpuʦsi, mo noʔusnu ts toŋnsnjs, ne noʔsnso mosoɗs sthʦu jsezoi ʦi hpɨhpɨŋɨ. ts mihnsnʔs, mo nsʔns msjshe ʔo his ohsusuhʦu ts ʦieŋpuʦsi, ʔoɗs his moujojsi toɗs msvʔovʔo ʦi msʦuʦums msezo nsʔns msjshe. mo msezo msnʔi ʦi koŋsɨ ts tsivsŋ ɗs uhne ʦeiŋpuʦsi ho mʔesʦʔo to koozo, ʔemo msiʦs ʦi koozo nsʔno sino jsts tsivsŋ ʔoɗ s*t*ʦ*.
S.TRANSL: 柬埔寨這個國家，位於東南亞，過去是一個以農業為主的國家。近年來，柬埔寨的經濟發展迅速，製造業興起。臺灣也有很多公司到柬埔寨去設立工廠，這些工廠需要臺灣人來管理。

S.FORM: avinano, 'e hpʉhpʉngʉ eni mo maezo man'i 'oisicu teomneni ho poa yaa tpsʉa to 'oyonatmopsʉ cila yoni pakuci, mo na'no pepe 'ola hnoo homo yahioa tola 'oyona pakuci. la akoyuno aʉt'ʉt'ʉcʉ tola bua kokungo ci cou, la poa yahioa to 'aemona tola yoni pakuci 'ola meelʉ bua kokungo ci cou.
S.PHON: svinsno, ʔe hpɨhpɨŋɨ eni mo msezo msnʔi ʔoisiʦu teomneni ho pos jss tpsɨs to ʔojonstmopsɨ ʦiɗs joni pskuʦi, mo nsʔno pepe ʔoɗs hnoo homo jshios toɗs ʔojons pskuʦi. ɗs skojuno sɨtʔɨtʔɨʦɨ toɗs ɓus kokuŋo ʦi ʦou, ɗs pos jshios to ʔsemons toɗs joni pskuʦi ʔoɗs meeɗɨ ɓus kokuŋo ʦi ʦou.

S.TRANSL: 另一方面，這個國家有很多合法的賭場，賭場裡面的工作薪資都很高。為了要服務說華語的客人，賭場裡就需要會說華語的工作人員。

S.FORM: ko'koeno, mo man'i 'ola lemeknuyu ciithonga la mainca mo man'i 'ete pela hioa, uk'a cite nama oyangva ci tonx no yahioai, o'ate ahʉyʉ tuyafo no peisu no hikooki ho peisu no miski, 'avinano isicu teomneni ne seifu citela hioa, maezo pepe 'ote hnoo.
S.PHON: koʔkoeno, mo msnʔi ʔoɗs ɗemeknuju ʦiithoŋs ɗs msinʦs mo msnʔi ʔete peɗs hios, ukʔs ʦite nsms ojsŋvs ʦi ton* no jshiosi, oʔste shɨjɨ tujsfo no peisu no hikooki ho peisu no miski, ʔsvinsno isiʦu teomneni ne seifu ʦiteɗs hios, msezo pepe ʔote hnoo.

S.PHON: koʔkoeno, mo msnʔi ʔoɗs ɗemeknuju ʦiithoŋs ɗs msinʦs mo msnʔi ʔete peɗs hios, ukʔs ʦite nsms ojsŋvs ʦi ton* no jshiosi, oʔste shɨjɨ tujsfo no peisu no hikooki ho peisu no miski, ʔsvinsno isiʦu teomneni ne seifu ʦiteɗs hios, msezo pepe ʔote hnoo.
S.TRANSL: 因此，有許多詐騙集團，聲稱有一些很好的工作機會，不需要困難的工作能力，不用負擔機票和住宿費，並且是合法的工作，也有很高的薪資。

S.FORM: 'emo maica ci pat'a'ausna, ma lahec'o titha meknuyu no mocmo ci e'e.
S.PHON: ʔemo msiʦs ʦi pstʔsʔsusns, ms ɗsheʦʔo tiths meknuju no moʦmo ʦi eʔe.
S.FORM: 'emo maica ci pat'a'ausna, ma lahec'o titha meknuyu no mocmo ci e'e.
S.PHON: ʔemo msiʦs ʦi pstʔsʔsusns, ms ɗsheʦʔo tiths meknuju no moʦmo ʦi eʔe.
S.TRANSL: 這些說法，其實都是他們用來騙人的話術。

S.FORM: 'o lemeknuyu la asonx mi'usnu note akoyuno uhto ceingpucai ho yahioa ci cou ho m'ea peisu no sookai, i'mi tamo maica ci hia meknuyu ho peapapayo'i na peisuhe.
S.PHON: ʔo ɗemeknuju ɗs sson* miʔusnu note skojuno uhto ʦeiŋpuʦsi ho jshios ʦi ʦou ho mʔes peisu no sooksi, iʔmi tsmo msiʦs ʦi his meknuju ho pespspsjoʔi ns peisuhe.
S.FORM: 'o lemeknuyu la asonx mi'usnu note akoyuno uhto ceingpucai ho yahioa ci cou ho m'ea peisu no sookai, i'mi tamo maica ci hia meknuyu ho peapapayo'i na peisuhe.
S.PHON: ʔo ɗemeknuju ɗs sson* miʔusnu note skojuno uhto ʦeiŋpuʦsi ho jshios ʦi ʦou ho mʔes peisu no sooksi, iʔmi tsmo msiʦs ʦi his meknuju ho pespspsjoʔi ns peisuhe.
S.TRANSL: 詐騙者可能會要求要前往柬埔寨打工的人支付高額介紹費，從而騙取他們的錢財。

S.FORM: i'ote akoyuno yahioa ho micu sʉc'ʉhʉ ne ciengpucai, lahe asona cohivi na 'e ihe hioa mo 'asʉftonʉ yupa h'unasi na ohe temneni cite hioa. 'o lemeknuyu ciithonga lahe peapapayo'i peknui 'ote yahioa ho poa yongtomo covhi ci hpʉhpʉngʉ, pa'hismsmoi ho poa yongto o'aisi teomneni to seifo ci koozo hocieno poa yongto isi yophia cila yoni yahioai, avinano la na'na cʉecʉ 'ola hnoo.
S.PHON: iʔote skojuno jshios ho miʦu sɨʦʔɨhɨ ne ʦieŋpuʦsi, ɗshe ssons ʦohivi ns ʔe ihe hios mo ʔssɨftonɨ jups hʔunssi ns ohe temneni ʦite hios. ʔo ɗemeknuju ʦiithoŋs ɗshe pespspsjoʔi peknui ʔote jshios ho pos joŋtomo ʦovhi ʦi hpɨhpɨŋɨ, psʔhismsmoi ho pos joŋto oʔsisi teomneni to seifo ʦi koozo hoʦieno pos joŋto isi jophis ʦiɗs joni jshiosi, svinsno ɗs nsʔns ʦɨeʦɨ ʔoɗs hnoo.

'o lemeknuyu ciithonga lahe peapapayo'i peknui 'ote yahioa ho poa yongtomo covhi ci hpʉhpʉngʉ, pa'hismsmoi ho poa yongto o'aisi teomneni to seifo ci koozo hocieno poa yongto isi yophia cila yoni yahioai, avinano la na'na cʉecʉ 'ola hnoo.
S.PHON: iʔote skojuno jshios ho miʦu sɨʦʔɨhɨ ne ʦieŋpuʦsi, ɗshe ssons ʦohivi ns ʔe ihe hios mo ʔssɨftonɨ jups hʔunssi ns ohe temneni ʦite hios. ʔo ɗemeknuju ʦiithoŋs ɗshe pespspsjoʔi peknui ʔote jshios ho pos joŋtomo ʦovhi ʦi hpɨhpɨŋɨ, psʔhismsmoi ho pos joŋto oʔsisi teomneni to seifo ʦi koozo hoʦieno pos joŋto isi jophis ʦiɗs joni jshiosi, svinsno ɗs nsʔns ʦɨeʦɨ ʔoɗs hnoo.
S.TRANSL: 當打工者到達柬埔寨時，他們可能會發現自己的工作與當初所承諾的完全不同。詐騙集團會將打工者騙到偏遠地區，強迫他們在非法工廠或危險工作場所工作，而且工資非常低。

S.FORM: ta mihnan'a mo man'i 'ola singvung hookoku ihe teo'lʉi emo maica ci a'a'ausna, ko'koeno i'ola lemeknuyu ciithoang ne ciengpucai ihe yaeza teoteovahi 'olahe titha meknuyu ci pat'a'ausna.
S.PHON: ts mihnsnʔs mo msnʔi ʔoɗs siŋvuŋ hookoku ihe teoʔɗɨi emo msiʦs ʦi sʔsʔsusns, koʔkoeno iʔoɗs ɗemeknuju ʦiithosŋ ne ʦieŋpuʦsi ihe jsezs teoteovshi ʔoɗshe tiths meknuju ʦi pstʔsʔsusns.
S.FORM: ta mihnan'a mo man'i 'ola singvung hookoku ihe teo'lʉi emo maica ci a'a'ausna, ko'koeno i'ola lemeknuyu ciithoang ne ciengpucai ihe yaeza teoteovahi 'olahe titha meknuyu ci pat'a'ausna.

S.TRANSL: 近期有很多新聞報導注意到這些事情，因此柬埔寨詐騙集團也重新調整了他們用來欺騙的話語。

S.FORM: lahe poa cʉecʉa 'o hnoo, poa noezuhu ne thaikuo hocieno mietin 'ote atuhca yoni yahioa, 'ote hioalahe yaeza eʉsvʉta tamo botngonʉ tela atuhcu yahioa no tenki chumu, lahe akoevano poa o'te ngoheʉngeʉa 'otela akoyu no uhn'e ho yahioa ci cou ta taivang.
S.PHON: ɗshe pos ʦɨeʦɨs ʔo hnoo, pos noezuhu ne thsikuo hoʦieno mietin ʔote stuhʦs joni jshios, ʔote hiosɗshe jsezs eɨsvɨts tsmo ɓotŋonɨ teɗs stuhʦu jshios no tenki ʦhumu, ɗshe skoevsno pos oʔte ŋoheɨŋeɨs ʔoteɗs skoju no uhnʔe ho jshios ʦi ʦou ts tsivsŋ.

S.TRANSL: 他們把薪資降低、把目的地更改為泰國或緬甸，工作也改用水電工等職缺作為廣告，試圖讓想要前往打工的臺灣人降低防備心。

S.FORM: i'ote yahioa ho lac'u sʉc'ʉhʉ ne ciengpucai, lahe ti'einga 'o souciihe, a'vinano poa titheni tola kokuzo ci cou ne'e. 'o kokuzo ci cou la boemi to lahe ti'einga ci souci ho psoyaski to o'a aʉmtʉ ci a'a'ausna, boemi to ongko to lahe akuzkuzoa ci cou ho peknui 'o nanghia ho poa uhne ciengpucai ho poa miapeisua.
S.PHON: iʔote jshios ho ɗsʦʔu sɨʦʔɨhɨ ne ʦieŋpuʦsi, ɗshe tiʔeiŋs ʔo souʦiihe, sʔvinsno pos titheni toɗs kokuzo ʦi ʦou neʔe. ʔo kokuzo ʦi ʦou ɗs ɓoemi to ɗshe tiʔeiŋs ʦi souʦi ho psojsski to oʔs sɨmtɨ ʦi sʔsʔsusns, ɓoemi to oŋko to ɗshe skuzkuzos ʦi ʦou ho peknui ʔo nsŋhis ho pos uhne ʦieŋpuʦsi ho pos mispeisus.

'o kokuzo ci cou la boemi to lahe ti'einga ci souci ho psoyaski to o'a aʉmtʉ ci a'a'ausna, boemi to ongko to lahe akuzkuzoa ci cou ho peknui 'o nanghia ho poa uhne ciengpucai ho poa miapeisua.

S.TRANSL: 打工者到了柬埔寨之後，甚至會被沒收手機，並且被當地黑幫拿去使用。黑幫透過他們沒收的手機發出貼文，假冒受害者，邀約受害者朋友前來柬埔寨賺錢。

S.FORM: 'ela meknuyu ci a'a'ausna, aʉmtʉs'a kuici a'a'ausna. tetola aʉmta ʉmnʉ ci ta'to'tohʉngva, te yainenu tela o'te peela peknui.

S.TRANSL: 這些欺騙人的行為，實在是太糟糕了。我們應該仔細想一想，怎麼樣才不會被騙。

S.FORM: 'o lahe titha yoolio meknuyu ci e'e, atuhcu yaa, o'ate peisngoseo, uk'a citela yam'osuu, man'i 'o peisu. ʉmnʉ ci ta'to'tohʉngva, uk'a ci tes'a aha'o yaa ʉmnʉ ho o'ate nama bitototnʉ yahioa ci hioa.
S.PHON: ʔo ɗshe tiths jooɗio meknuju ʦi eʔe, stuhʦu jss, oʔste peisŋoseo, ukʔs ʦiteɗs jsmʔosuu, msnʔi ʔo peisu. ɨmnɨ ʦi tsʔtoʔtohɨŋvs, ukʔs ʦi tesʔs shsʔo jss ɨmnɨ ho oʔste nsms ɓitototnɨ jshios ʦi hios.

S.TRANSL: 他們用來騙人的話術，主要有：工作輕鬆、時間自由、薪資高、獎金多。仔細一想，天下應該不會有這麼好的不勞而獲的工作。

S.TRANSL: 我們原住民的祖先，世世代代在這塊土地上生活，用他們的汗水耕耘著這塊土地，從土地上收穫所需要的種種。

S.FORM: tetola noʉt'ʉci ho yu'ticngicngiha 'emo maica ci hoyunsova, asngʉcva ʉmnʉ ci aʉt'ʉ'tʉca 'e ohela haengi no nila mamameoi ci ceoa.

S.TRANSL: 我們也應該繼承這種勤奮努力的精神，好好地繼續耕耘這塊土地才是。

S.TRANSL: 「這是什麼？」小小的、圓圓的。她摸到了檳榔。

S.PHON: ɓsnkske jsmʔumʔs. isiʦu peɨʦʔɨhs ʔo hseŋu.
S.TRANSL: 高高的、毛茸茸的。她摸到了芒草。

S.FORM: maeno, kahkʉmnʉ, zou sungu no moatʉ'nʉ.
S.PHON: mseno, kshkɨmnɨ, zou suŋu no mostɨʔnɨ.
S.FORM: maeno, kahkʉmnʉ, zou sungu no moatʉ'nʉ.
S.PHON: mseno, kshkɨmnɨ, zou suŋu no mostɨʔnɨ.
S.TRANSL: 尖尖的、粗粗的，是山羌的角。

S.FORM: "zou cuma eni?" vhongʉ ho taacvoh'i. ma teesi!
S.PHON: "zou ʦums eni?" vhoŋɨ ho tssʦvohʔi. ms teesi!
S.FORM: "zou cuma eni?" vhongʉ ho taacvoh'i. ma teesi!
S.PHON: "zou ʦums eni?" vhoŋɨ ho tssʦvohʔi. ms teesi!
S.TRANSL: 「這是什麼？」細細的又長長的。是絲線！

S.FORM: isi e'tʉi, uk'a ci hioasi.
S.PHON: isi eʔtɨi, ukʔs ʦi hiossi.
S.FORM: isi e'tʉi, uk'a ci hioasi.
S.PHON: isi eʔtɨi, ukʔs ʦi hiossi.
S.TRANSL: 她拉了一下，沒有反應。

S.FORM: mo i'vaho butasu e'tʉi hepeohi. akameisʉ espayo 'o botngonʉ ci ak'emameoi.
S.PHON: mo iʔvsho ɓutssu eʔtɨi hepeohi. sksmeisɨ espsjo ʔo ɓotŋonɨ ʦi skʔemsmeoi.
S.FORM: mo i'vaho butasu e'tʉi hepeohi. akameisʉ espayo 'o botngonʉ ci ak'emameoi.

S.TRANSL: 她再用力地拉了一下。一拉，突然出現了很多神靈。

S.FORM: "sia suu?" tuocosi to sayungu.
S.PHON: "sis suu?" tuoʦosi to ssjuŋu.
S.FORM: "sia suu?" tuocosi to sayungu.
S.PHON: "sis suu?" tuoʦosi to ssjuŋu.
S.TRANSL: 「你是誰？」sayungu 問。

S.FORM: "'a ak'e fi'i a'o." "zou ak'e moatʉ'nʉ a'o." "zou ak'e haengu a'o."
S.PHON: "ʔs skʔe fiʔi sʔo." "zou skʔe mostɨʔnɨ sʔo." "zou skʔe hseŋu sʔo."
S.FORM: "'a ak'e fi'i a'o." "zou ak'e moatʉ'nʉ a'o." "zou ak'e haengu a'o."
S.PHON: "ʔs skʔe fiʔi sʔo." "zou skʔe mostɨʔnɨ sʔo." "zou skʔe hseŋu sʔo."
S.TRANSL: 「我是檳榔神。」「我是山羌神。」「我是芒草神。」神靈們說。

S.FORM: "o'a os'os'a honga muu, mainci imus'a i'ima a'o?" yainca to sayungu.
S.PHON: "oʔs osʔosʔs hoŋs muu, msinʦi imusʔs iʔims sʔo?" jsinʦs to ssjuŋu.
S.FORM: "o'a os'os'a honga muu, mainci imus'a i'ima a'o?" yainca to sayungu.
S.PHON: "oʔs osʔosʔs hoŋs muu, msinʦi imusʔs iʔims sʔo?" jsinʦs to ssjuŋu.
S.TRANSL: 「我不認識你們，你們為什麼要找我？」sayungu 說。

S.FORM: tmuhsohʉ tmunoi 'o sayungu, 'ia ma moc'o yacei.
S.PHON: tmuhsohɨ tmunoi ʔo ssjuŋu, ʔis ms moʦʔo jsʦei.
S.FORM: tmuhsohʉ tmunoi 'o sayungu, 'ia ma moc'o yacei.
S.PHON: tmuhsohɨ tmunoi ʔo ssjuŋu, ʔis ms moʦʔo jsʦei.
S.TRANSL: sayungu 大叫了一聲，原來是一場夢。

S.FORM: yainca to ino, "sayungu, misucu mainsohʉ ho misu amamio, te'o hafa suu ho biebimi to saisi."
S.PHON: jsinʦs to ino, "ssjuŋu, misuʦu msinsohɨ ho misu smsmio, teʔo hsfs suu ho ɓieɓimi to ssisi."

S.TRANSL: 媽媽說：「sayungu，你已經病了一週了，我帶你去找祭師。」

S.FORM: ino ho i'o sayungu sʉc'ʉhʉ to emoo to saisi.
S.PHON: ino ho iʔo ssjuŋu sɨʦʔɨhɨ to emoo to ssisi.
S.FORM: ino ho i'o sayungu sʉc'ʉhʉ to emoo to saisi.
S.PHON: ino ho iʔo ssjuŋu sɨʦʔɨhɨ to emoo to ssisi.
S.TRANSL: 媽媽和 sayungu 來到祭師的家。

S.FORM: 'o sayungu isi eʉsvta to saisi mo pus'olʉ tomo conci taunon'vʉ ci cei.

S.TRANSL: sayungu 告訴祭師她做了一個奇怪的夢。

S.FORM: saisi mo mi'usnu to sayungu ho yainca, "isicu epeia su."
S.PHON: ssisi mo miʔusnu to ssjuŋu ho jsinʦs, "isiʦu epeis su."
S.FORM: saisi mo mi'usnu to sayungu ho yainca, "isicu epeia su."

S.TRANSL: 祭師對 sayungu 說：「看來你被選上了。」

S.FORM: isi yainca to saisi, "mala yu'ti'eopʉ to cou ho ak'e mameoi ci teesi"
S.PHON: isi jsinʦs to ssisi, "msɗs juʔtiʔeopɨ to ʦou ho skʔe msmeoi ʦi teesi"
S.FORM: isi yainca to saisi, "mala yu'ti'eopʉ to cou ho ak'e mameoi ci teesi"
S.PHON: isi jsinʦs to ssisi, "msɗs juʔtiʔeopɨ to ʦou ho skʔe msmeoi ʦi teesi"
S.TRANSL: 「那是連結人和神靈的絲線啊。」祭師說。

S.FORM: sʉlopʉn la kaebʉ homo 'apʉpʉyʉ to tutu no mav'ov'o ci cacʉfea. 'i nʉskʉ, sʉlopʉn baito tomo yonto ceonʉ ci tutu no kitposa. mita aveoveoyʉ ho toe'unu maita'e, ma mita o'te buebealʉ ho smopcuku.
S.PHON: sɨɗopɨn ɗs kseɓɨ homo ʔspɨpɨjɨ to tutu no msvʔovʔo ʦi ʦsʦɨfes. ʔi nɨskɨ, sɨɗopɨn ɓsito tomo jonto ʦeonɨ ʦi tutu no kitposs. mits sveoveojɨ ho toeʔunu msitsʔe, ms mits oʔte ɓueɓesɗɨ ho smopʦuku.
S.FORM: sʉlopʉn la kaebʉ homo 'apʉpʉyʉ to tutu no mav'ov'o ci cacʉfea. 'i nʉskʉ, sʉlopʉn baito tomo yonto ceonʉ ci tutu no kitposa. mita aveoveoyʉ ho toe'unu maita'e, ma mita o'te buebealʉ ho smopcuku.
S.PHON: sɨɗopɨn ɗs kseɓɨ homo ʔspɨpɨjɨ to tutu no msvʔovʔo ʦi ʦsʦɨfes. ʔi nɨskɨ, sɨɗopɨn ɓsito tomo jonto ʦeonɨ ʦi tutu no kitposs. mits sveoveojɨ ho toeʔunu msitsʔe, ms mits oʔte ɓueɓesɗɨ ho smopʦuku.
S.TRANSL: sʉlopʉn 很喜歡蒐集不同植物的種子。有一次，sʉlopʉn 看到路上有月桃的種子。她興奮地跑過去，卻不小心跌倒了。

S.FORM: "sʉlopʉn maezo smopcuku ho mita peayofʉ, mita angu yoyoi'u!" cocvi to lahen'i tmahmʉhmʉskʉ 'e sʉlopʉn. 'e sʉlopʉn mita 'evono 'oha kaebʉ, at'inghi o'a mitas'a ya'ei. pxta si tutu, hocu maine'e.
S.PHON: "sɨɗopɨn msezo smopʦuku ho mits pesjofɨ, mits sŋu jojoiʔu!" ʦoʦvi to ɗshenʔi tmshmɨhmɨskɨ ʔe sɨɗopɨn. ʔe sɨɗopɨn mits ʔevono ʔohs kseɓɨ, stʔiŋhi oʔs mitssʔs jsʔei. p*ts si tutu, hoʦu msineʔe.
S.FORM: "sʉlopʉn maezo smopcuku ho mita peayofʉ, mita angu yoyoi'u!" cocvi to lahen'i tmahmʉhmʉskʉ 'e sʉlopʉn. 'e sʉlopʉn mita 'evono 'oha kaebʉ, at'inghi o'a mitas'a ya'ei. pxta si tutu, hocu maine'e.
S.PHON: "sɨɗopɨn msezo smopʦuku ho mits pesjofɨ, mits sŋu jojoiʔu!" ʦoʦvi to ɗshenʔi tmshmɨhmɨskɨ ʔe sɨɗopɨn. ʔe sɨɗopɨn mits ʔevono ʔohs kseɓɨ, stʔiŋhi oʔs mitssʔs jsʔei. p*ts si tutu, hoʦu msineʔe.
S.TRANSL: 「sʉlopʉn 跑步也會跌倒，也太弱了吧！」男同學取笑 sʉlopʉn。雖然 sʉlopʉn 很不開心，但她沒有說話。握著種子，回家了。

S.FORM: sʉlopʉn is sia tamo yonta tposno pangka ci oko no hako si tutu. 'aemonassi sii tamo maamtanʉ 'o'o'kosi ci tutu, mo meheacni si tutu no evinokʉyʉpa.
S.PHON: sɨɗopɨn is sis tsmo jonts tposno psŋks ʦi oko no hsko si tutu. ʔsemonsssi sii tsmo mssmtsnɨ ʔoʔoʔkosi ʦi tutu, mo mehesʦni si tutu no evinokɨjɨps.
S.FORM: sʉlopʉn is sia tamo yonta tposno pangka ci oko no hako si tutu. 'aemonassi sii tamo maamtanʉ 'o'o'kosi ci tutu, mo meheacni si tutu no evinokʉyʉpa.
S.PHON: sɨɗopɨn is sis tsmo jonts tposno psŋks ʦi oko no hsko si tutu. ʔsemonsssi sii tsmo mssmtsnɨ ʔoʔoʔkosi ʦi tutu, mo mehesʦni si tutu no evinokɨjɨps.
S.TRANSL: sʉlopʉn把種子放到書桌上的小盒子裡。裡面放著大大小小的種子，有一顆是木棉的種子。

S.FORM: "te'o peela titha 'e tutu ho peʉezeni si lako titha peispak'i ci kuyai?" isi tuocosi ta sʉlopʉn. "o'a! 'ala titha ta haahocngʉ si kuyai no peispak'i, o'a te peela titha ta maamespingi!" yainca ta ohaesa.
S.PHON: "teʔo peeɗs tiths ʔe tutu ho peɨezeni si ɗsko tiths peispskʔi ʦi kujsi?" isi tuoʦosi ts sɨɗopɨn. "oʔs! ʔsɗs tiths ts hsshoʦŋɨ si kujsi no peispskʔi, oʔs te peeɗs tiths ts mssmespiŋi!" jsinʦs ts ohsess.
S.FORM: "te'o peela titha 'e tutu ho peʉezeni si lako titha peispak'i ci kuyai?" isi tuocosi ta sʉlopʉn. "o'a! 'ala titha ta haahocngʉ si kuyai no peispak'i, o'a te peela titha ta maamespingi!" yainca ta ohaesa.
S.PHON: "teʔo peeɗs tiths ʔe tutu ho peɨezeni si ɗsko tiths peispskʔi ʦi kujsi?" isi tuoʦosi ts sɨɗopɨn. "oʔs! ʔsɗs tiths ts hsshoʦŋɨ si kujsi no peispskʔi, oʔs te peeɗs tiths ts mssmespiŋi!" jsinʦs ts ohsess.
S.TRANSL: 「我可以用這顆種子跟你交換玩具車嗎？」sʉlopʉn 問。「不行！玩具車是男生的玩具，女生不能玩！」弟弟說。

S.FORM: 'emo macocono tutu mo acʉhʉ yaa ehohanva a. sʉlopʉn hola 'oha kaebʉ, tasicu mi'usni 'emo pio ci tutu. isi ta'uiva 'e tutu tesi pela pafi no tonʉ, ko'ko o'alasi secʉ'ha ciha.
S.PHON: ʔemo msʦoʦono tutu mo sʦɨhɨ jss ehohsnvs s. sɨɗopɨn hoɗs ʔohs kseɓɨ, tssiʦu miʔusni ʔemo pio ʦi tutu. isi tsʔuivs ʔe tutu tesi peɗs psfi no tonɨ, koʔko oʔsɗssi seʦɨʔhs ʦihs.
S.FORM: 'emo macocono tutu mo acʉhʉ yaa ehohanva a. sʉlopʉn hola 'oha kaebʉ, tasicu mi'usni 'emo pio ci tutu. isi ta'uiva 'e tutu tesi pela pafi no tonʉ, ko'ko o'alasi secʉ'ha ciha.
S.PHON: ʔemo msʦoʦono tutu mo sʦɨhɨ jss ehohsnvs s. sɨɗopɨn hoɗs ʔohs kseɓɨ, tssiʦu miʔusni ʔemo pio ʦi tutu. isi tsʔuivs ʔe tutu tesi peɗs psfi no tonɨ, koʔko oʔsɗssi seʦɨʔhs ʦihs.
S.TRANSL: 每顆種子都有故事。sʉlopʉn 不開心的時候，就會看著這些種子。她相信種子能給她勇氣，所以捨不得丟掉。

S.FORM: o'a isi cohivi, 'e tutu micu na'no man'i acʉhʉ no uk'a na ci isi sii. 'o aemana ta emoo zou cu acʉhʉ 'oisi 'apʉ'pʉya to sʉlopʉn ci tutu.
S.PHON: oʔs isi ʦohivi, ʔe tutu miʦu nsʔno msnʔi sʦɨhɨ no ukʔs ns ʦi isi sii. ʔo semsns ts emoo zou ʦu sʦɨhɨ ʔoisi ʔspɨʔpɨjs to sɨɗopɨn ʦi tutu.
S.FORM: o'a isi cohivi, 'e tutu micu na'no man'i acʉhʉ no uk'a na ci isi sii. 'o aemana ta emoo zou cu acʉhʉ 'oisi 'apʉ'pʉya to sʉlopʉn ci tutu.
S.PHON: oʔs isi ʦohivi, ʔe tutu miʦu nsʔno msnʔi sʦɨhɨ no ukʔs ns ʦi isi sii. ʔo semsns ts emoo zou ʦu sʦɨhɨ ʔoisi ʔspɨʔpɨjs to sɨɗopɨn ʦi tutu.
S.TRANSL: 不知不覺，種子已經多到放不下了。房間裡到處都是sʉlopʉn 蒐集的種子。

S.FORM: sʉlopʉn mo ivaho emoyafo ho matmʉtʉ to tutu. mo mici matmxtx to tutu no evno pcʉʉ.

S.TRANSL: sʉlopʉn今天又出門撿種子。她想要撿一顆欒樹的種子，送給生病的爸爸，希望他趕快好起來。

S.FORM: sʉlopʉn isi aiti 'o skufu to evno pcʉʉ mo yaa meiavovei ci teongo. 'iama, mo mcoi'o peongsisi.
S.PHON: sɨɗopɨn isi siti ʔo skufu to evno pʦɨɨ mo jss meisvovei ʦi teoŋo. ʔisms, mo mʦoiʔo peoŋsisi.

S.TRANSL: sʉlopʉn 發現欒樹下有一群蜜蜂在飛來飛去。原來，女王蜂死了。sʉlopʉn覺得很奇怪，立刻趕回家。

S.FORM: at'inghi, 'o 'ukholan o'aihes'a smoyoa 'o yatatiskova ne solen'olahe hia pohcinghia, namamo pebobotngonʉ 'omo heetai ci maamespingi, 'o hia botngonʉ to micu heetai ci maamespingi micu asa'o no posieimo.
S.PHON: stʔiŋhi, ʔo ʔukhoɗsn oʔsihesʔs smojos ʔo jststiskovs ne soɗenʔoɗshe his pohʦiŋhis, nsmsmo peɓoɓotŋonɨ ʔomo heetsi ʦi mssmespiŋi, ʔo his ɓotŋonɨ to miʦu heetsi ʦi mssmespiŋi miʦu sssʔo no posieimo.
S.FORM: at'inghi, 'o 'ukholan o'aihes'a smoyoa 'o yatatiskova ne solen'olahe hia pohcinghia, namamo pebobotngonʉ 'omo heetai ci maamespingi, 'o hia botngonʉ to micu heetai ci maamespingi micu asa'o no posieimo.

S.TRANSL: 然而，烏克蘭人並不害怕俄國人醜惡的暴行，反而有愈來愈多的女性從軍，女性軍人的人數已經超過了五萬人。

S.TRANSL: sʉlopʉn 認為弟弟比較有能力繼承傳統領袖。躲在房間，不知所措，握著昨天撿到的種子，睡著了。

S.FORM: cu peihsasmome 'e sʉlopʉn, aiti 'omo yonto pangka ci saiptuku, sii to tutu no ton'u 'o ciengonasi.
S.PHON: ʦu peihsssmome ʔe sɨɗopɨn, siti ʔomo jonto psŋks ʦi ssiptuku, sii to tutu no tonʔu ʔo ʦieŋonssi.
S.FORM: cu peihsasmome 'e sʉlopʉn, aiti 'omo yonto pangka ci saiptuku, sii to tutu no ton'u 'o ciengonasi.
S.PHON: ʦu peihsssmome ʔe sɨɗopɨn, siti ʔomo jonto psŋks ʦi ssiptuku, sii to tutu no tonʔu ʔo ʦieŋonssi.
S.TRANSL: sʉlopʉn 醒來後，看見桌上有一張紙條，旁邊放著小米種子。

S.FORM: "sʉlopʉn, zou sotva'esi no ohaeva, mohtala asonhoi baito to hie ci oko, takola ʉnmʉ ci aʉt'ʉca 'e emoo.
S.PHON: "sɨɗopɨn, zou sotvsʔesi no ohsevs, mohtsɗs ssonhoi ɓsito to hie ʦi oko, tskoɗs ɨnmɨ ʦi sɨtʔɨʦs ʔe emoo.
S.FORM: "sʉlopʉn, zou sotva'esi no ohaeva, mohtala asonhoi baito to hie ci oko, takola ʉnmʉ ci aʉt'ʉca 'e emoo.
S.PHON: "sɨɗopɨn, zou sotvsʔesi no ohsevs, mohtsɗs ssonhoi ɓsito to hie ʦi oko, tskoɗs ɨnmɨ ʦi sɨtʔɨʦs ʔe emoo.
S.TRANSL: 「sʉlopʉn，你是長嗣，是家裡第一個看見太陽的孩子，以後要好好照顧家裡。」

S.FORM: "ma osic'o la ayocneni to amo ci teonghia. sʉlopʉn, 'ote ngoheʉngeʉ, 'a teko ahtuo'te sotva'esi yaa tonʉa ci h'oceona tayaezoi.

S.TRANSL: 「那是爸爸為你準備的禮物。sʉlopʉn，不要害怕，你會成為最棒的傳統領袖。」媽媽說。

S.FORM: "te'ola pnanfi." mi'unu to inosi 'o sʉlopʉn ho yainca. isi so'aemona to pania 'o tutu no ton'u, moyai conci skuu.

S.TRANSL: 「我會努力的。」sʉlopʉn 對媽媽說。她把小米種子放進小瓶子，做成一條項鍊。

S.PHON: ne ohʦuɗs tesi ʔe peisu no keshʔɨts, ʦu sɗɨ ɓotŋ*n* ʦi ʦou ʔomo tmssʔuzo, te peeɗs pstotisks to sɨmtɨ peisu no keshʔɨts no his totiski pepe. stʔiŋhi ne miʦu toŋsohs no **** feohno ʔeems ne mio, ʔo hupohins tomo sʔʦonis ʦi peisu no keshʔɨts, oʔsmo smsko ohʦɨʔho no ʦonʦi peisu no sŋmu.
S.FORM: ne ohcula teai 'e peisu no keah'ʉta, cu alʉ botngxnx ci cou 'omo tmaa'uzo, te peela patotiska to aʉmtʉ peisu no keah'ʉta no hia totiski pepe. at'inghi ne micu tongsoha no 2010 feohno 'eema ne mio, 'o hupohina tomo s'conia ci peisu no keah'ʉta, o'amo amako ohcʉ'ho no conci peisu no angmu.
S.PHON: ne ohʦuɗs tesi ʔe peisu no keshʔɨts, ʦu sɗɨ ɓotŋ*n* ʦi ʦou ʔomo tmssʔuzo, te peeɗs pstotisks to sɨmtɨ peisu no keshʔɨts no his totiski pepe. stʔiŋhi ne miʦu toŋsohs no **** feohno ʔeems ne mio, ʔo hupohins tomo sʔʦonis ʦi peisu no keshʔɨts, oʔsmo smsko ohʦɨʔho no ʦonʦi peisu no sŋmu.
S.TRANSL: 比特幣被創造出來以後，就有一群人相信，它可以跟真正的貨幣一樣有價值。但是在2010年的5月的時候，100個比特幣的價格，也還不到1美金。

S.FORM: panto cihi ci cou mo yonto unlu ho yainca, te kaebʉ titho note posimaskʉ ci peisu no keah'ʉta, ho yupa mexe note yuso ci phisa. at'inghi micu amio miteuhi uk'a cimo ahtu biebiemi, ac'ʉhʉ ne micu mispo'thi cu petohʉyʉ yaa mhino to phisa ho faeni, cu ahoi pebobotngonʉ cila tmaa'uzo, pithopi tecu a'sʉftonʉ ʉmnʉ ci peisu no keah'ʉta.
S.PHON: psnto ʦihi ʦi ʦou mo jonto unɗu ho jsinʦs, te kseɓɨ titho note posimsskɨ ʦi peisu no keshʔɨts, ho jups me*e note juso ʦi phiss. stʔiŋhi miʦu smio miteuhi ukʔs ʦimo shtu ɓieɓiemi, sʦʔɨhɨ ne miʦu mispoʔthi ʦu petohɨjɨ jss mhino to phiss ho fseni, ʦu shoi peɓoɓotŋonɨ ʦiɗs tmssʔuzo, pithopi teʦu sʔsɨftonɨ ɨmnɨ ʦi peisu no keshʔɨts.
S.FORM: panto cihi ci cou mo yonto unlu ho yainca, te kaebʉ titho note posimaskʉ ci peisu no keah'ʉta, ho yupa mexe note yuso ci phisa. at'inghi micu amio miteuhi uk'a cimo ahtu biebiemi, ac'ʉhʉ ne micu mispo'thi cu petohʉyʉ yaa mhino to phisa ho faeni, cu ahoi pebobotngonʉ cila tmaa'uzo, pithopi tecu a'sʉftonʉ ʉmnʉ ci peisu no keah'ʉta.
S.PHON: psnto ʦihi ʦi ʦou mo jonto unɗu ho jsinʦs, te kseɓɨ titho note posimsskɨ ʦi peisu no keshʔɨts, ho jups me*e note juso ʦi phiss. stʔiŋhi miʦu smio miteuhi ukʔs ʦimo shtu ɓieɓiemi, sʦʔɨhɨ ne miʦu mispoʔthi ʦu petohɨjɨ jss mhino to phiss ho fseni, ʦu shoi peɓoɓotŋonɨ ʦiɗs tmssʔuzo, pithopi teʦu sʔsɨftonɨ ɨmnɨ ʦi peisu no keshʔɨts.
S.TRANSL: 當時有個人在網路上跟大家說，他願意用10000個比特幣，跟別人交換兩個大披薩。但是經過了3天都沒有人理他，直到第4天才有人把披薩賣給了他。從那時以後，開始有愈來愈多人相信，比特幣可以成為真實的貨幣。

S.FORM: uhto lasi yoni oengʉtʉ to aomo 'o sʉlopʉn, teolʉi mo acʉhʉ mongsi. isi aiti 'o amosi homo oevoi to hoposi, o'te ma ake'i aot'ou, maezo tmu'upu mongsi.
S.PHON: uhto ɗssi joni oeŋɨtɨ to somo ʔo sɨɗopɨn, teoɗɨi mo sʦɨhɨ moŋsi. isi siti ʔo smosi homo oevoi to hoposi, oʔte ms skeʔi sotʔou, msezo tmuʔupu moŋsi.
S.FORM: uhto lasi yoni oengʉtʉ to aomo 'o sʉlopʉn, teolʉi mo acʉhʉ mongsi. isi aiti 'o amosi homo oevoi to hoposi, o'te ma ake'i aot'ou, maezo tmu'upu mongsi.
S.PHON: uhto ɗssi joni oeŋɨtɨ to somo ʔo sɨɗopɨn, teoɗɨi mo sʦɨhɨ moŋsi. isi siti ʔo smosi homo oevoi to hoposi, oʔte ms skeʔi sotʔou, msezo tmuʔupu moŋsi.
S.TRANSL: sʉlopʉn 來到爸爸的房間，發現大家都在哭。她看著爸爸躺在床上，動也不動了，也大哭了起來。

S.FORM: ne noana'o, mosola titho to macucuma 'e cou ho yupa mexmexe. mis'a hocieno, panomo mʉm'ʉ no cnʉmʉ ci cou, mo mʉm'ʉ no 'ungeai 'o tahin'i cu meelʉ yupa meʉmeʉe no heʉheʉm'ʉ, maica tec'u meelʉ bonʉ note asuhcu man'i ci 'oanʉ.
S.PHON: ne nosnsʔo, mosoɗs titho to msʦuʦums ʔe ʦou ho jups me*me*e. misʔs hoʦieno, psnomo mɨmʔɨ no ʦnɨmɨ ʦi ʦou, mo mɨmʔɨ no ʔuŋesi ʔo tshinʔi ʦu meeɗɨ jups meɨmeɨe no heɨheɨmʔɨ, msiʦs teʦʔu meeɗɨ ɓonɨ note ssuhʦu msnʔi ʦi ʔosnɨ.
S.FORM: ne noana'o, mosola titho to macucuma 'e cou ho yupa mexmexe. mis'a hocieno, panomo mʉm'ʉ no cnʉmʉ ci cou, mo mʉm'ʉ no 'ungeai 'o tahin'i cu meelʉ yupa meʉmeʉe no heʉheʉm'ʉ, maica tec'u meelʉ bonʉ note asuhcu man'i ci 'oanʉ.
S.PHON: ne nosnsʔo, mosoɗs titho to msʦuʦums ʔe ʦou ho jups me*me*e. misʔs hoʦieno, psnomo mɨmʔɨ no ʦnɨmɨ ʦi ʦou, mo mɨmʔɨ no ʔuŋesi ʔo tshinʔi ʦu meeɗɨ jups meɨmeɨe no heɨheɨmʔɨ, msiʦs teʦʔu meeɗɨ ɓonɨ note ssuhʦu msnʔi ʦi ʔosnɨ.
S.TRANSL: 最早的時候，人們用東西直接交換東西。例如，有人種了一些香蕉，而鄰居種了一些鳳梨，他們可以互相交換彼此的作物，這樣大家都可以吃到更多的食物。

S.FORM: at'inghi homo maica o'a mos'a hunano ʉmnʉ. mais'a hocieno panomo meoman'i no cnʉmʉ ci cou, mo tata'e no mici meʉe no pangka to taiku, at'inghi 'o teiku o'amos'a mici meʉe note man'i ci cnʉmʉ, atuhcu noko na isi tata'ia, homo maica 'a ihin'is'a aepʉnga hioa na yupa meʉmeʉe ci a'a'ausna.
S.PHON: stʔiŋhi homo msiʦs oʔs mosʔs hunsno ɨmnɨ. msisʔs hoʦieno psnomo meomsnʔi no ʦnɨmɨ ʦi ʦou, mo tstsʔe no miʦi meɨe no psŋks to tsiku, stʔiŋhi ʔo teiku oʔsmosʔs miʦi meɨe note msnʔi ʦi ʦnɨmɨ, stuhʦu noko ns isi tstsʔis, homo msiʦs ʔs ihinʔisʔs sepɨŋs hios ns jups meɨmeɨe ʦi sʔsʔsusns.
S.FORM: at'inghi homo maica o'a mos'a hunano ʉmnʉ. mais'a hocieno panomo meoman'i no cnʉmʉ ci cou, mo tata'e no mici meʉe no pangka to taiku, at'inghi 'o teiku o'amos'a mici meʉe note man'i ci cnʉmʉ, atuhcu noko na isi tata'ia, homo maica 'a ihin'is'a aepʉnga hioa na yupa meʉmeʉe ci a'a'ausna.
S.PHON: stʔiŋhi homo msiʦs oʔs mosʔs hunsno ɨmnɨ. msisʔs hoʦieno psnomo meomsnʔi no ʦnɨmɨ ʦi ʦou, mo tstsʔe no miʦi meɨe no psŋks to tsiku, stʔiŋhi ʔo teiku oʔsmosʔs miʦi meɨe note msnʔi ʦi ʦnɨmɨ, stuhʦu noko ns isi tstsʔis, homo msiʦs ʔs ihinʔisʔs sepɨŋs hios ns jups meɨmeɨe ʦi sʔsʔsusns.
S.TRANSL: 但是這樣做並不方便。例如，有人種了很多香蕉，他想要跟木工換一張桌子，但是木工並不需要那麼多香蕉，他想需的是鋸子，那麼他們就無法完成交換。

S.FORM: ko'koeno, mohcula tiezuhu titho to kacaci hocieno king, zinzu maica sopepea ci macucuma ho titha yupa meʉmeʉe ci a'a'ausna, 'aeno eni na niala peisu no keah'ʉta ne auyusi. 'o king ho ingi mosola na'no kakutia, o'a mos'a ahtu aezuhu na hia pepea, ko'ko ohola pela titha ci peisu no keah'ʉta.
S.PHON: koʔkoeno, mohʦuɗs tiezuhu titho to ksʦsʦi hoʦieno kiŋ, zinzu msiʦs sopepes ʦi msʦuʦums ho tiths jups meɨmeɨe ʦi sʔsʔsusns, ʔseno eni ns nisɗs peisu no keshʔɨts ne sujusi. ʔo kiŋ ho iŋi mosoɗs nsʔno kskutis, oʔs mosʔs shtu sezuhu ns his pepes, koʔko ohoɗs peɗs tiths ʦi peisu no keshʔɨts.
S.FORM: ko'koeno, mohcula tiezuhu titho to kacaci hocieno king, zinzu maica sopepea ci macucuma ho titha yupa meʉmeʉe ci a'a'ausna, 'aeno eni na niala peisu no keah'ʉta ne auyusi. 'o king ho ingi mosola na'no kakutia, o'a mos'a ahtu aezuhu na hia pepea, ko'ko ohola pela titha ci peisu no keah'ʉta.
S.PHON: koʔkoeno, mohʦuɗs tiezuhu titho to ksʦsʦi hoʦieno kiŋ, zinzu msiʦs sopepes ʦi msʦuʦums ho tiths jups meɨmeɨe ʦi sʔsʔsusns, ʔseno eni ns nisɗs peisu no keshʔɨts ne sujusi. ʔo kiŋ ho iŋi mosoɗs nsʔno kskutis, oʔs mosʔs shtu sezuhu ns his pepes, koʔko ohoɗs peɗs tiths ʦi peisu no keshʔɨts.
S.TRANSL: 於是，人們就改用貝殼或是黃金、白銀等貴重的金屬來當作交換的媒介，也就是早期的貨幣。金和銀都很稀少，不會失去它的價值，所以可以用來當作貨幣。

S.FORM: at'inghi honci panonte uhne coshi ho covnx, hocieno panonte mhino no pepe ci emoo, hote tmoepoyʉ ho mahafo no man'i ci king te na'no 'oha xmnx. ko'ko 'e mav'ov'o ci hpʉhpʉngʉ mohcula iachi moyai to peisu no saiptuku, ho titha ta iachi hpʉhpʉngʉ ci keah'ʉta ci peisu.
S.PHON: stʔiŋhi honʦi psnonte uhne ʦoshi ho ʦovn*, hoʦieno psnonte mhino no pepe ʦi emoo, hote tmoepojɨ ho mshsfo no msnʔi ʦi kiŋ te nsʔno ʔohs *mn*. koʔko ʔe msvʔovʔo ʦi hpɨhpɨŋɨ mohʦuɗs isʦhi mojsi to peisu no ssiptuku, ho tiths ts isʦhi hpɨhpɨŋɨ ʦi keshʔɨts ʦi peisu.
S.FORM: at'inghi honci panonte uhne coshi ho covnx, hocieno panonte mhino no pepe ci emoo, hote tmoepoyʉ ho mahafo no man'i ci king te na'no 'oha xmnx. ko'ko 'e mav'ov'o ci hpʉhpʉngʉ mohcula iachi moyai to peisu no saiptuku, ho titha ta iachi hpʉhpʉngʉ ci keah'ʉta ci peisu.
S.PHON: stʔiŋhi honʦi psnonte uhne ʦoshi ho ʦovn*, hoʦieno psnonte mhino no pepe ʦi emoo, hote tmoepojɨ ho mshsfo no msnʔi ʦi kiŋ te nsʔno ʔohs *mn*. koʔko ʔe msvʔovʔo ʦi hpɨhpɨŋɨ mohʦuɗs isʦhi mojsi to peisu no ssiptuku, ho tiths ts isʦhi hpɨhpɨŋɨ ʦi keshʔɨts ʦi peisu.
S.TRANSL: 但是如果有人要到遠方旅行，或者要購買昂貴的房屋時，搬運大量的黃金並不方便。因此各個國家都發行自己的紙鈔，作為國家的貨幣。

S.FORM: akoeva no poa tma'uzo ta ihe teai ci peisu no saiptuku ta 'oyona tmopsʉ te o'te atavei kuici saiptuku, te maezo yaa yupa toteski man'i ci tela sia ci king. 'avinano tela mi'usnu ta cou 'e 'oyonatmopsʉ ho yainca, te pela peʉi ta king 'e peisu no saiptuku.
S.PHON: skoevs no pos tmsʔuzo ts ihe tesi ʦi peisu no ssiptuku ts ʔojons tmopsɨ te oʔte stsvei kuiʦi ssiptuku, te msezo jss jups toteski msnʔi ʦi teɗs sis ʦi kiŋ. ʔsvinsno teɗs miʔusnu ts ʦou ʔe ʔojonstmopsɨ ho jsinʦs, te peɗs peɨi ts kiŋ ʔe peisu no ssiptuku.
S.FORM: akoeva no poa tma'uzo ta ihe teai ci peisu no saiptuku ta 'oyona tmopsʉ te o'te atavei kuici saiptuku, te maezo yaa yupa toteski man'i ci tela sia ci king. 'avinano tela mi'usnu ta cou 'e 'oyonatmopsʉ ho yainca, te pela peʉi ta king 'e peisu no saiptuku.
S.PHON: skoevs no pos tmsʔuzo ts ihe tesi ʦi peisu no ssiptuku ts ʔojons tmopsɨ te oʔte stsvei kuiʦi ssiptuku, te msezo jss jups toteski msnʔi ʦi teɗs sis ʦi kiŋ. ʔsvinsno teɗs miʔusnu ts ʦou ʔe ʔojonstmopsɨ ho jsinʦs, te peɗs peɨi ts kiŋ ʔe peisu no ssiptuku.
S.TRANSL: 為了要讓人們相信政府印製的紙鈔不會變成廢紙，早期的政府在印製紙鈔時，都要有對應的黃金儲存量。並且政府也會跟人民說，隨時都可以將紙鈔換回黃金。

S.FORM: ne moso tongsoha no 1971 ne mio, yainca to letayaezoi ne angmu nikosʉn, hotela moyai ta peisu no angmu o'ate ahʉyʉ ya totiski man'i nate sia ci king, 'e cou o'ate ahʉyʉ titho no saiptuku ci peisu ho meʉe to king. 'emo maica ci a'a'ausna o'a ihes'a payo'a na sinkoohe tala lemoyai peisu ci 'oyonatmopsʉhe hola moyai peisu no saiptuku, hoci amako asngʉcʉ ya singkoo ta 'oyona tmopsʉ 'e cou, 'e peisu no keah'ʉta tec'o n'ala asngʉca peela titha mhimhino no macucuma.
S.PHON: ne moso toŋsohs no **** ne mio, jsinʦs to ɗetsjsezoi ne sŋmu nikosɨn, hoteɗs mojsi ts peisu no sŋmu oʔste shɨjɨ js totiski msnʔi nste sis ʦi kiŋ, ʔe ʦou oʔste shɨjɨ titho no ssiptuku ʦi peisu ho meɨe to kiŋ. ʔemo msiʦs ʦi sʔsʔsusns oʔs ihesʔs psjoʔs ns sinkoohe tsɗs ɗemojsi peisu ʦi ʔojonstmopsɨhe hoɗs mojsi peisu no ssiptuku, hoʦi smsko ssŋɨʦɨ js siŋkoo ts ʔojons tmopsɨ ʔe ʦou, ʔe peisu no keshʔɨts teʦʔo nʔsɗs ssŋɨʦs peeɗs tiths mhimhino no msʦuʦums.
S.FORM: ne moso tongsoha no 1971 ne mio, yainca to letayaezoi ne angmu nikosʉn, hotela moyai ta peisu no angmu o'ate ahʉyʉ ya totiski man'i nate sia ci king, 'e cou o'ate ahʉyʉ titho no saiptuku ci peisu ho meʉe to king. 'emo maica ci a'a'ausna o'a ihes'a payo'a na sinkoohe tala lemoyai peisu ci 'oyonatmopsʉhe hola moyai peisu no saiptuku, hoci amako asngʉcʉ ya singkoo ta 'oyona tmopsʉ 'e cou, 'e peisu no keah'ʉta tec'o n'ala asngʉca peela titha mhimhino no macucuma.
S.PHON: ne moso toŋsohs no **** ne mio, jsinʦs to ɗetsjsezoi ne sŋmu nikosɨn, hoteɗs mojsi ts peisu no sŋmu oʔste shɨjɨ js totiski msnʔi nste sis ʦi kiŋ, ʔe ʦou oʔste shɨjɨ titho no ssiptuku ʦi peisu ho meɨe to kiŋ. ʔemo msiʦs ʦi sʔsʔsusns oʔs ihesʔs psjoʔs ns sinkoohe tsɗs ɗemojsi peisu ʦi ʔojonstmopsɨhe hoɗs mojsi peisu no ssiptuku, hoʦi smsko ssŋɨʦɨ js siŋkoo ts ʔojons tmopsɨ ʔe ʦou, ʔe peisu no keshʔɨts teʦʔo nʔsɗs ssŋɨʦs peeɗs tiths mhimhino no msʦuʦums.
S.TRANSL: 1971年，美國尼克森總統宣布，印製美鈔不需要有對應的黃金儲存，人們也不能用美鈔換回黃金。這件事情並沒有使人們對政府印製的紙鈔失去信心，而只要人們對政府有信心，貨幣仍然可以繼續用來購買各種東西。

S.FORM: tapeoha no yaa singkooa ta 'oyonatmopsʉ 'e cou, tela maezo ya singkooa tola meoino ngingkoo. 'e a'a'ausna maitan'e tapeoha no titho to peisu no saiptuku 'e cou, la maezo na'nosino titho tola yainca sinyonkha. la toehunga yainca 'e sinyonkha ngomu ci keah'ʉta ci peisu, te peela yais'a titha ci peisu no keah'ʉta ho titha, mo atuhcu lahe ʉm'ʉmnʉa ta cou 'ola hia pmotmopsʉ ta ingkoo.
S.PHON: tspeohs no jss siŋkoos ts ʔojonstmopsɨ ʔe ʦou, teɗs msezo js siŋkoos toɗs meoino ŋiŋkoo. ʔe sʔsʔsusns msitsnʔe tspeohs no titho to peisu no ssiptuku ʔe ʦou, ɗs msezo nsʔnosino titho toɗs jsinʦs sinjonkhs. ɗs toehuŋs jsinʦs ʔe sinjonkhs ŋomu ʦi keshʔɨts ʦi peisu, te peeɗs jsisʔs tiths ʦi peisu no keshʔɨts ho tiths, mo stuhʦu ɗshe ɨmʔɨmnɨs ts ʦou ʔoɗs his pmotmopsɨ ts iŋkoo.
S.FORM: tapeoha no yaa singkooa ta 'oyonatmopsʉ 'e cou, tela maezo ya singkooa tola meoino ngingkoo. 'e a'a'ausna maitan'e tapeoha no titho to peisu no saiptuku 'e cou, la maezo na'nosino titho tola yainca sinyonkha. la toehunga yainca 'e sinyonkha ngomu ci keah'ʉta ci peisu, te peela yais'a titha ci peisu no keah'ʉta ho titha, mo atuhcu lahe ʉm'ʉmnʉa ta cou 'ola hia pmotmopsʉ ta ingkoo.
S.PHON: tspeohs no jss siŋkoos ts ʔojonstmopsɨ ʔe ʦou, teɗs msezo js siŋkoos toɗs meoino ŋiŋkoo. ʔe sʔsʔsusns msitsnʔe tspeohs no titho to peisu no ssiptuku ʔe ʦou, ɗs msezo nsʔnosino titho toɗs jsinʦs sinjonkhs. ɗs toehuŋs jsinʦs ʔe sinjonkhs ŋomu ʦi keshʔɨts ʦi peisu, te peeɗs jsisʔs tiths ʦi peisu no keshʔɨts ho tiths, mo stuhʦu ɗshe ɨmʔɨmnɨs ts ʦou ʔoɗs his pmotmopsɨ ts iŋkoo.
S.TRANSL: 人們除了對政府有信心之外，對於大型的銀行也很有信心。現代的社會，人們除了使用紙鈔以外，也經常會使用信用卡。信用卡被稱為塑膠貨幣，它能夠被當作貨幣來使用，是因為人們對銀行的記帳有信心。

S.FORM: mo mainenu ci lahes'a na'no ta'uiva ta cou 'e pithopi? ahoisi 'e'pithopi la titheni to kanpiuto ho tohtahsvʉta, 'o hiasi man'i mo posipusku se'eicha, ko'ko mo totiski to king mo yaa kakutia ci yu'ausnasi.

S.TRANSL: 為何人們會相信比特幣呢？首先是比特幣是用電腦計算出來的，它的總量是最多只有2100萬個，因此和黃金一樣具有稀少的特性。

S.FORM: 'o micu yuso mo atuhcu maica, 'o pitho'pi mo yaa titho ho yaa mexe ci a'a'ausna, lac'o acʉha titheni to kanpiuto ho tasvʉta. 'ola hia tmasvxtx, o'amos'a mais'a 'o ingkoo hoi'ola tmotmopsʉ tola yu'iuevaho ci cou, la atuhca peela titho to kanpiuto ta macicihi, acxha peela titha tmotmasvʉtʉ.

S.TRANSL: 其次是因為，比特幣的持有和交易，都是用電腦來計算的。計算的方式，並不是像銀行對客戶記帳的方式，而是可以將全世界每個人的電腦，都用來記帳。

S.FORM: 'o pasuya mo yaa pasimaskʉ ci pitho'pi ci a'a'ausna, te peela tposi ta kanpiuto. 'o pasuya isi faeni to mo'o 'omo s'econia ci pitho'pi, te yaeza peela tposi to kanpiuto. honci panonte meo'eoi ho taezuhi na nia tposʉta canpiuto, te peela titheni to mocmo ci kanpiuto ho cohivi. ko'koeno, 'e cou hotela ieni ta pitho'pi ho tposi na yuvaha, te peela asnsnana taa'uiva.

S.TRANSL: Kacaw有10000個比特幣這件事情，可以被記錄在每台電腦上。Kacaw把100個比特幣給了Dongi，也可以被記錄在每台電腦上。如果有人偷改了一兩台的電腦上的紀錄，從其他電腦的紀錄就會發現。因此，人們對於比特幣的記帳，可以有絕對的信心。

S.TRANSL: 從電腦計算而發明的加密貨幣，看起來是完全安全的貨幣，也是現代的新發明。然而2023年，全世界第二大的加密貨幣交易所FTX倒閉了。這個交易所挪用了大家交易的金錢，倒閉以後，大家都拿不回自己的錢。

S.TRANSL: 2022年，俄羅斯大舉入侵烏克蘭，世界各國都非常關心這個問題。臺灣也有很多人支持烏克蘭，有些人捐獻金錢，也有些醫生主動前往戰區協助。

S.TRANSL: Sincyang的媽媽因為擔心他的安全而表示反對，但是Sincyang堅定的心意並沒有改變。他在出國前才用電話告訴媽媽，他要到烏克蘭去了。

S.FORM: hola yone 'ukholan 'e sincyang, la asvʉtʉ ma'e'usnu to sasin no sʉ'eʉsʉ to yʉsʉ no hetai ho pai'usna to uanlu, lahe na'no ʉm'ʉmnʉa ta cou.
S.PHON: hoɗs jone ʔukhoɗsn ʔe sinʦjsŋ, ɗs ssvɨtɨ msʔeʔusnu to sssin no sɨʔeɨsɨ to jɨsɨ no hetsi ho psiʔusns to usnɗu, ɗshe nsʔno ɨmʔɨmnɨs ts ʦou.

S.TRANSL: Sincyang在烏克蘭的時間裡，有時會上傳一些他穿軍袍的照片到網路上，也引起了許多人的注意。

S.FORM: homo uhne 'ukholan 'e sincyang, te akoyuno aʉt'ʉcʉ to cou ne 'ukholan. ahoi ne micu sʉc'ʉhʉ ne 'ukholan, lasi asngʉca noyʉci 'emo maica ci tohʉngʉ.
S.PHON: homo uhne ʔukhoɗsn ʔe sinʦjsŋ, te skojuno sɨtʔɨʦɨ to ʦou ne ʔukhoɗsn. shoi ne miʦu sɨʦʔɨhɨ ne ʔukhoɗsn, ɗssi ssŋɨʦs nojɨʦi ʔemo msiʦs ʦi tohɨŋɨ.

S.PHON: homo uhne ʔukhoɗsn ʔe sinʦjsŋ, te skojuno sɨtʔɨʦɨ to ʦou ne ʔukhoɗsn. shoi ne miʦu sɨʦʔɨhɨ ne ʔukhoɗsn, ɗssi ssŋɨʦs nojɨʦi ʔemo msiʦs ʦi tohɨŋɨ.
S.TRANSL: Sincyang到烏克蘭去，是為了保護烏克蘭人民的家園。從他到達烏克蘭後，就一直堅守著這樣的心情。

S.FORM: moso meoino ku'kuici, mo inʉskʉ nemo sensoo, 'o sincyang isi ciha 'e iachi nsousi. ne ihecu cohivi to cono si emoo ta taivan aʉnmtʉs'a na'no nac'o, at'inghi ihe na'no itanveni, maica ho ita ciha 'e iachi nsou taini aʉmta afnasa koe'ia ta cou.
S.PHON: moso meoino kuʔkuiʦi, mo inɨskɨ nemo sensoo, ʔo sinʦjsŋ isi ʦihs ʔe isʦhi nsousi. ne iheʦu ʦohivi to ʦono si emoo ts tsivsn sɨnmtɨsʔs nsʔno nsʦʔo, stʔiŋhi ihe nsʔno itsnveni, msiʦs ho its ʦihs ʔe isʦhi nsou tsini sɨmts sfnsss koeʔis ts ʦou.

S.TRANSL: 不幸的是，在一次任務中，Sincyang犧牲了性命。遠在臺灣的家人得知後都很傷心，但也非常驕傲，因為他的犧牲奉獻令人敬佩。

S.FORM: ahoi ne noana'o, 'e yatatiskova mohcu la yaa mav'ov'o ci yu'susuyumo. to micu mocaefi ci se'sʉpta, 'e cou ta taivan mosola man'i ci pohcingha, maezo yaa mav'ov'o cila i'mi ne yafana ci cou, yaa man'i ci ehtothomʉ.

S.TRANSL: 自古以來，人們就有各式各樣的不同的戰爭。在過去400年，台灣原住民遭受許多的侵略，也跟很多不同的外來族群，有很多戰爭。

S.TRANSL: 人類為什麼要有戰爭呢？不外乎是無法滿足於自己的生活，想要搶奪更多的資源。

S.TRANSL: 過去，碰到外來者侵略時，原住民總是勇敢地保護自己的家園。

S.TRANSL: 為何比特幣可以被當作真正的貨幣呢？為何人們會相信比特幣呢？在加密貨幣還沒出現之前，人們最熟悉的貨幣是紙鈔。紙鈔只是一張紙，但是它卻可以用來購買食物、車輛，甚至可以用來購買房子。那又為何人們會相信這些印著數字的紙張呢？

S.FORM: tongsoha no 2012feohʉ no 'maskʉ ne mio, o'mo coni ci peisu no pithopi tec'u meelʉ yupa meʉe no tec'u asa'o no posinonmʉhʉ ci peisu no angmu. ne auyusi 'o isi titha mhino tomo yuso ci phisa ci peisu no keah'ʉta, maitan'e tec'u meelʉ msʉc'ʉhʉ no phisa, mo na'no meoisi ci h'oman'a. maica man'i ci phisa, tesi asona pelʉi feʉ'sa nate posieimo cila yoni ma'potʉ to mali ci 'untozoo.

S.FORM: yainca to naa'u, "'a naa'u 'o ongko'u, zou mamespingi a'o, ho ta'ucula saasmoyʉskʉ mici kangngovu."
S.PHON: jsinʦs to nssʔu, "ʔs nssʔu ʔo oŋkoʔu, zou msmespiŋi sʔo, ho tsʔuʦuɗs ssssmojɨskɨ miʦi ksŋŋovu."

S.TRANSL: naa’u 說：「我的名字是naa’u，我是女生，我長大以後想要當護士。」

S.FORM: yainca to pasuya, "'a pasuya 'o ongko'u, zou hahocngʉ a'o, ho ta'ucula saasmoyʉskʉ mici yahioai no lesmo'eisi."
S.PHON: jsinʦs to pssujs, "ʔs pssujs ʔo oŋkoʔu, zou hshoʦŋɨ sʔo, ho tsʔuʦuɗs ssssmojɨskɨ miʦi jshiosi no ɗesmoʔeisi."

S.TRANSL: pasuya 說：「我的名字是pasuya，我是男生，我長大以後想要當警察。」

S.FORM: yainca to paicʉ, "'a paicʉ 'o ongko'u, 'a mamespingi a'o, ho ta'ucula saasmoyʉskʉ tata'e no mici lepasunaeno."

S.FORM: yainca to 'avai, "'a 'avai a'o, zou hahocngʉ a'o, ho ta'ucula saasmoyʉskʉ tata'e no mici kangngofu."

S.TRANSL: ’avai 說：「我的名字是 ’avai，我是男生，我長大以後想要當護士。」

S.FORM: acʉhʉ cocvo ne ihecu talʉi, yainca to naa'u, acxhx "maamespingi 'o kangngofu, o'ate meelʉ kangngofu 'e hahocngʉ."
S.PHON: sʦɨhɨ ʦoʦvo ne iheʦu tsɗɨi, jsinʦs to nssʔu, sʦ*h* "mssmespiŋi ʔo ksŋŋofu, oʔste meeɗɨ ksŋŋofu ʔe hshoʦŋɨ."

S.TRANSL: 大家聽了以後一直笑，naa’u 說：「護士都是女生，男生不能當護士。」

S.FORM: yainca to lema'cohio, "tuocosi to lema'cohio, cuma nala atuhca hioa no kangngofu?"
S.PHON: jsinʦs to ɗemsʔʦohio, "tuoʦosi to ɗemsʔʦohio, ʦums nsɗs stuhʦs hios no ksŋŋofu?"
S.FORM: yainca to lema'cohio, "tuocosi to lema'cohio, cuma nala atuhca hioa no kangngofu?"

S.TRANSL: 老師說：「老師問大家，護士的工作是做什麼？」

S.FORM: yut'ingi 'o naa'u, "la aʉt'ʉcʉ tola amamio ci cou 'o kangngofu."
S.PHON: jutʔiŋi ʔo nssʔu, "ɗs sɨtʔɨʦɨ toɗs smsmio ʦi ʦou ʔo ksŋŋofu."
S.FORM: yut'ingi 'o naa'u, "la aʉt'ʉcʉ tola amamio ci cou 'o kangngofu."

S.TRANSL: naa’u 回答：「護士照顧病人。」

S.FORM: yainca to lema'cohio, "tuocosi to lema'cohio, cuma na lasi atuhca hioa to lesmo'eisi?"
S.PHON: jsinʦs to ɗemsʔʦohio, "tuoʦosi to ɗemsʔʦohio, ʦums ns ɗssi stuhʦs hios to ɗesmoʔeisi?"
S.FORM: yainca to lema'cohio, "tuocosi to lema'cohio, cuma na lasi atuhca hioa to lesmo'eisi?"
S.PHON: jsinʦs to ɗemsʔʦohio, "tuoʦosi to ɗemsʔʦohio, ʦums ns ɗssi stuhʦs hios to ɗesmoʔeisi?"
S.TRANSL: 老師說：「老師問大家，警察的工作是做什麼？」

S.FORM: yut'ingi 'o pasuya, "la tʉtpʉtʉ to kuici cou 'o lesmo'eisi, aʉt'ʉca 'o ʉmnʉ ci cou."
S.PHON: jutʔiŋi ʔo pssujs, "ɗs tɨtpɨtɨ to kuiʦi ʦou ʔo ɗesmoʔeisi, sɨtʔɨʦs ʔo ɨmnɨ ʦi ʦou."
S.FORM: yut'ingi 'o pasuya, "la tʉtpʉtʉ to kuici cou 'o lesmo'eisi, aʉt'ʉca 'o ʉmnʉ ci cou."
S.PHON: jutʔiŋi ʔo pssujs, "ɗs tɨtpɨtɨ to kuiʦi ʦou ʔo ɗesmoʔeisi, sɨtʔɨʦs ʔo ɨmnɨ ʦi ʦou."
S.TRANSL: pasuya 回答：「警察要捉壞人，保護好人。」

S.FORM: yainca to lema'cohio, "tuocosi to lema'cohio, cuma nala atuhca hioa to lepasunaeno?"
S.PHON: jsinʦs to ɗemsʔʦohio, "tuoʦosi to ɗemsʔʦohio, ʦums nsɗs stuhʦs hios to ɗepssunseno?"

S.TRANSL: 老師說：「老師問大家，歌星的工作是做什麼？」

S.FORM: yainca to paicʉ, "la moengʉ ho isi talʉi 'o lepasunaeno homo pasunaeno."
S.PHON: jsinʦs to psiʦɨ, "ɗs moeŋɨ ho isi tsɗɨi ʔo ɗepssunseno homo pssunseno."
S.FORM: yainca to paicʉ, "la moengʉ ho isi talʉi 'o lepasunaeno homo pasunaeno."
S.PHON: jsinʦs to psiʦɨ, "ɗs moeŋɨ ho isi tsɗɨi ʔo ɗepssunseno homo pssunseno."
S.TRANSL: paicʉ 說：「歌星唱歌很好聽，大家聽了很開心。」

S.FORM: yainca to lema'cohio, "ko'koeno, 'upena na hahocngʉ hocieno mamespini, hoci moengʉ na pasunaeno tec'u meelʉ lepasunaeno."
S.PHON: jsinʦs to ɗemsʔʦohio, "koʔkoeno, ʔupens ns hshoʦŋɨ hoʦieno msmespini, hoʦi moeŋɨ ns pssunseno teʦʔu meeɗɨ ɗepssunseno."
S.FORM: yainca to lema'cohio, "ko'koeno, 'upena na hahocngʉ hocieno mamespini, hoci moengʉ na pasunaeno tec'u meelʉ lepasunaeno."

S.TRANSL: 老師說：「所以，不管是男生或是女生，唱歌好聽就可以當歌星」

S.FORM: 'upena hoci hahocngʉ hocieno mamespingi, amako meelʉ tʉtpʉtʉ no kuici cou, aʉt'ʉca 'na ʉmnʉ ci cou, tec'u meelʉ yahioa no lesmo'eisi."

S.TRANSL: 「不管是男生或是女生，能捉壞人，保護好人，就可以當警察」

S.FORM: "'upena hoci hahocngʉ hocieno mamespingi, hoci amako meelʉ aʉt'ʉcʉ nomo amamio ci cou tec'u meelʉ yahioa no kangngofu."

S.TRANSL: 「不管是男生或是女生，能照顧病人就可以當護士。」

S.FORM: ivaha yainca to lema'cohio, "naa'u ho 'avai, temula bumemealʉ aʉsvʉtʉ no tela yainenu na tela hia aʉt'ʉcʉ no cou, no ta'esi te meelʉ aʉmtʉ ʉmnʉ ci kangngofu."

S.TRANSL: 老師又說：「naa’u 和 ’avai，你們要好好學習怎麼照顧人，以後都可以成為很好的護士」。

S.FORM: tonsoha no1922 ne mio, mo yac'ʉ 'o solen, 'o 'ukolan mo mahi'unu to solen ohela aʉt'ʉsca. tongsoha no 1991 ne mio, mohcu emo'ʉ 'o solen, 'o ukola mohcu la iachi hpʉhpʉngʉ.

S.TRANSL: 1922年，蘇聯成立，烏克蘭隸屬蘇聯統治。1991年，蘇聯解體，烏克蘭成為一個獨立的國家。

S.TRANSL: 烏克蘭獨立後，和俄羅斯之間發生了很多衝突。

S.FORM: yainca no to'tohʉngʉ to paicʉ, mamos'a uhnenu 'o kio? te'on'a i'ima.

S.FORM: mo smai'o'ofeihni to va'hʉ 'o paicʉ ho coeconʉ, ita aiti 'omo meoino c'oeha, at'inghi uk'aci kio to 'aiemona to c'oeha.

S.TRANSL: paicʉ沿著小溪走，她看到了一條大河，但是河裡沒有青蛙。

S.FORM: "zou, temia cu maine'e!" moozoyʉ 'o 'o'oko.

S.FORM: ko'ko eno, 'upena hoci mainenu avaevezohu 'e hpʉhpʉngʉ, 'upena hoci mainenu avaevoezuhu na tela titha ci macucuma, na tela hia yupa einu na atva'esi ci a'a'ausna.

S.TRANSL: 所以，不論時代如何改變，不管人們使用的工具如何變化，人與人之間的信任才是最重要的。
